groups.title: Getting Started
groups.blurb: Session zero: learn the pack, meet the Guide, pick a path.

quests.title: Welcome to All of Create!
quests.subtitle: To start the tutorial, click on this quest and read the description.
quests.description:
This tutorial will guide you through some basic features. Don't worry, it won't take too long!

To start, click the checkmark under the word "Tasks" and then claim the Quest Reward. New quests will start to appear!

If new quests do not start appearing, try rejoining your world. Do not eat the bread until the tutorial is finished.

quests.title: Inventory
quests.subtitle: Read my description!
quests.description:
The icon in the top left of the screen is the FTB Teams menu. This allows you to add other players to your team.

On the right of the FTB Teams icon is the Quest Book icon, which allows you to access the Quest Book at any time.

When you click the square at the top left of your player display, your Curios slots will become visible. Some items, such as Elytras and Totems can be equipped here.

quests.title: Quests
quests.subtitle: Read my description!
quests.description:
Tasks are things that need to be done to complete a quest. If a task is an item, clicking on it will show its recipe.

Rewards are what you get after completing all Tasks. Click to claim.

The pin icon at the top right will pin a quest to your screen.

quests.title: Important Controls
quests.subtitle: Read my description! Make sure to scroll down.
quests.description:
Press R while hovering over an item to view its Recipe

Press U while hovering over an item to view its Uses

Press C to Crawl

Press M to open the World Map

Press U to Create a New Waypoint

Press B to open your Backpack

{@pagebreak}

quests.title: Just Enough Items (JEI)
quests.subtitle: Read my description!
quests.description:
At the bottom of the inventory, you may have noticed a search bar.

This is the Just Enough Items, or JEI, search bar. 

If you type "Wood", for example, the JEI item list at the right of the screen will show all items with "Wood" in the name.

Adding a @ at the start of the search query will show the items from a specific mod, for example @Adorn

To favorite an item, press A while hovering over it in the JEI item list.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Read my description!
quests.description:
The tutorial is now finished! 

To view the rest of the quests, put your cursor to the left of the screen and expand the Quest Groups. 

Feel free to join our Discord for any other questions you may have: https://lunapixel.studio/discord

groups.title: Adventurer's Primer
groups.blurb: Tools, maps, home, and choice: the first pages of your chronicle.

chapters.title: Adventurer's Primer
chapters.subtitle: Session zero — tools, maps, home, choice

quests.title: Session Zero
quests.subtitle: The Guide clears its throat.
quests.description:
Welcome to the Realm of All Creation — kinetics, curses, spellfire, and open sky.
This is Session Zero. Check when you have read the table rules and are ready to roll.

quests.title: The Sage's Lens
quests.subtitle: Names are half the battle.
quests.description:
Sages sorted the world into searchable truths.
Open JEI (or your recipe book). Find any Create item. Check when the habit sticks.

quests.title: Cartographer's Compact
quests.subtitle: No party survives without maps.
quests.description:
Craft a Nature's Compass. The biomes have opinions; learn to ask politely.
The Guide prefers parties who can find a cogwheel before they find a grave.
Mark the compass as standard kit — Session Zero ends when the map starts talking.

quests.title: Cryptographer's Needle
quests.subtitle: Structures do not RSVP.
quests.description:
Craft an Explorer's Compass. Point it at something that wants you dead. Smile.
Structures do not send invitations. They send corpses with interesting pockets.
Point it at a dungeon. Smile like you meant to.

quests.title: Stones of Return
quests.subtitle: Every hero needs a way home.
quests.description:
Place a Waystone. Home is not cowardice — it is logistics with feeling.
Waystones are not cowardice — they are the difference between a campaign and a funeral.
Place one near the hold. Name it something you would defend in court.

quests.title: Claim Your Camp
quests.subtitle: The land remembers banners.
quests.description:
Pitch a claim or party camp. This patch of dirt is now lore.
Check when your base has a name you would defend in court.

quests.title: Choose Your Path
quests.subtitle: Multiclassing is encouraged. Commitment is optional.
quests.description:
Artificer, Champion, Spellwright, Starfarer, Hearthkeeper — pick a first obsession.
Check when you know which Book you will open next.

quests.title: First Tribute
quests.subtitle: The Guide accepts bread as diplomacy.
quests.description:
Bake or obtain 8 Bread. Feed the party. Empires are built on carbs.
The Guide accepts carbs as diplomacy. Empires forget this and starve.
Feed the party before you feed the forge.

groups.title: Engineer's Paradise
groups.blurb: The kinetic heart of the pack: Create and its deepest branches.

quests.title: Andesite, the Foundation
quests.subtitle: Okay so, andesite is a very abundant stone that you can find in large pockets underground, and they blend really well with the stone texture so keep your eyes open for some. You'll need a lot of this stone if you are going to make any machinery around here so dig as much as you can! Mental note as well, Zinc ores are important too as using it with andesite makes the important alloy used to making machinery.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: The basis for more advanced blocks.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle:
The basis of most things fluid related in Create.\
\
Can also be used to encase fluid pipes.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle:
In order to make a train you're going to need at least:\
- 1 Train Casing\
- 1 Train Station\
- Enough train tracks to make your railroad.\
\
In order to see how you assemble a train "ponder" the train station.

quests.title: Wi-Fi? No?
quests.subtitle: Lets you transfer a redstone signal wirelessly within a range. No, this is not for Wi-Fi.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A redstone component that outputs a signal when in contact with another redstone contact. Perticularly useful for building contraptions.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle:
A kinetic source that uses the flow of water as its source of energy. Will generate the same amount of SU at the same RPM as long as one block of flowing water is adjacent.\
\
You can also swich the look of your water wheel by right-clicking it with pretty much any wood plank (including ones from other mods).

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Generates twice as much SU as the regular water wheel but at a slower RPM. Just know that this thing is bigger and bulkier so have a lot of space for it.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Lets you see the current stress and stress capacity of a kinetic network, not the stress of someone else.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Lets you see the rotational speed of a kinetic network.

quests.title: Full Steam Ahead!
quests.subtitle: The densest kinetic source. Although it also has the highest complexity, requiring a steady source of water and heat, and no this is not a steam locomotive like Thomas the Tank Engine.

quests.title: Don't get blown away
quests.subtitle: You know what a windmill is, right? This uses wind to spin around and generate SUs for use.

quests.title: Crank it all the way!
quests.subtitle: The simplest way to generate kinetic energy, by using yourself as the power source. Get that arm strength!

quests.title: Blaze Burner
quests.subtitle:
In order to get brass you're going to need to heat a mechanical mixer that's mixing copper and zinc.\
\
 the Empty Blaze burner can be filled by right-clicking it on either a blaze spawner or a blaze.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle:
A machine that can autocraft shapeless recepies aswell as mix things like potions.\
\
Needs to rotate at at least 30 rpm to function

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Can be used to place or extract large bodies of liquid.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Allows for the extraction of liquids from items.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Used for filling items with fluids and crafting certain items using fluids.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Allows contraptions to transfer fluids to blocks.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Lets you use SU to break blocks, can also be attached to contraptions to make tunnel bores and the like.

quests.title: Non-Portable Chainsaw
quests.subtitle: Blocks that can fell trees or allow contraptions to fell trees. As well as some crafting recipes like cutting blocks or stripping logs.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Blocks that allow contraptions to harvest crops.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Blocks that allow contraptions to create farmland or launch entities.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Lets you clear and pave whilst riding a train.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Essentially the an upgrade to the millstone, provides some different recipes so it might be worth keeping both around.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Blocks that both allow for automatic crafting of normal recipes and the crafting of recipes that are bigger than a normal crafting table would allow for.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: An advanced item distribution machine that works if you make it point to specific points that the arm can reach, if it can't reach, the arm won't work, also requires SUs to move it.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: An item used to craft more advanced mechanical items.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Allows for fine tuning of rpm, meaning you can modify how fast or slow it can be.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Allows you to control the train.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Gives off a redstone signal when detecting a train.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Used to control the flow of trains across tracks and intersections of tracks.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: The block that deals with train assembly and dissasembly.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Lets you schedule trains so that mobs or blaze burnders can drive them.

quests.title: Train Tracks
quests.subtitle: The thing your train goes on.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Simply a Potato Cannon.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Lets you place down a mirror that assists you in building symmetrical things.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Grinding it all down to dust.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A very versitile machine that can pull and push entities aswell as wash, haunt, blast and smoke items. No, this is not for household use.

quests.title: Untitled Quest

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: An upgraded version of the Copper Backtank. How is there so much defense if you're not protected from the front, though?

quests.title: Untitled Quest

quests.title: This is not a Monkey Wrench

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle:
"A fancier rope pulley"\
\
Allows for the creation of elevators.

Some fluids can be infinity extracted from the world as long as the pool the hose pulley is extracting from contains 10000 or more source blocks.\

You can search in REI for the fluids that apply using by typing "$create:bottomless"

quests.title: Untitled Quest

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle:
When placed in front of the Encased Fan this allows it to haunt items.\
\
Notably sand into soul sand.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle:
When placed in front of the Encased Fan this allows it to wash items.\

Notably soul sand into nether quartz.

A block that allows input and output of inventories 1 item at a time.\

One thing not mentioned by the ponder is that the funnel can drop items on the ground when placed on an inventory and will only keep 1 item on the ground if it's close enough to the block the item lands on.

quests.title: Untitled Quest

quests.title: Don't wear this, it's not for clothes.
quests.subtitle: Mechanical belts are useful in moving items either in a straight line and diagonally. Make sure to stick one shaft on each end to connect so it will work.

quests.title: Rod of Constant Rotation
quests.subtitle: A Shaft is another basic but important machinery part that is required to make anything move with rotation. You can also extend the shaft to make it longer and affect more than one contraption that requires rotation.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Chutes are used to transfer between inventories vertically.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A more configurable chute.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A basic filter.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A filter that can filter by attributes like "can be smelted" or "from Create".

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: It's really just a belt that doesn't move.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Weighted Ejectors can throw items accuratly long distances.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A multi-block item storage that can't be accessed manually. Not even a door can open it.

quests.subtitle: Okay, I may be exaggerating a little, but redstone also plays a vital role to Create that the blocks in here make redstone contraptions more compact but also a bit more complicated, have fun studying.

quests.title: I'm so stressed! I need to measure it!
quests.subtitle:
Terminoloy:\
\
Stress Units(SU) a number that describes how much stress something generates or requires to run.\
\

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: The Gearbox is sort of like an extension cord, but for shafts where it can change the direction of the shafts and can have more than one shaft attached in a different side of the gearbox. A vertical gearbox also exists.

quests.title: Untitled Quest

quests.title: Untitled Quest

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Lets you turn off parts of contraptions while they are formed.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: As the name implies this item allows you to glue blocks together. Perticularly useful when making contraptions. Good thing we don't have fingers or the glue will stick to our hands... wait.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Allows for the creation of contraptions that move up and down.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Allows for contraptions that traverse rails in the same way minecarts do.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Allows for contraptions that rotate around a point in space, particularly useful for farms.

quests.title: Mechanical Piston
quests.subtitle: Allows for movement of structures linearly using rotational force.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Allows for contraptions that move across gantries.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A useful block for building contraptions.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Sticks to blocks when powered by redstone.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Ooh, this is a fun contraption! Okay, so this thing is used to build your structures automatically, provided that you have a structure printed out in your schematic paper. You just need to prepare gunpowder and a storage unit with the required materials to build what you want. Also use a clipboard, will ya? It'll take note of the materials for you.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle:
Since most blocks in Create don't allow for manual extraction and insertion of liquids these pipes are rather useful.\
\
Can also be used to create infinite water by extracting from a source-block that has 2 source-blocks adjacent to it.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: The main block used for bulk fluid storage.

quests.title: Chair.
quests.subtitle: It's just a seat, nothing more, nothing less. But if you're in a moving contraption, might as well glue it to the contraption so you can sit and move along with it. Don't superglue yourself to the seat.

quests.title: Are they just gears, but named differently?
quests.subtitle: Cogwheels are used to either increase rotational speed or to extend contraptions depending on the way they're facing. Play around with the sizes of the cogwheels and see what you can make out of them.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Essential for any person working with Create. Allows you to see more information about blocks like stress impact.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle:
Ever wanted to pipe liquids into your blaze burners? Just hand them a straw and they'll slurp it straight from the pipe.\
\
You can press 'U' on the straw to see what liquids it accepts as well as burn times.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A motor that converts energy(E) into kinetic energy(SU) at any rpm.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Generates energy(E) from kinetic energy, the amount generated is dependent on the rpm and caps at 256E/t

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Crafts plates into rods and rods into wires.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Lets you charge certain items.

quests.title: Untitled Quest

quests.title: Untitled Quest

quests.title: Untitled Quest

quests.title: Copycat
quests.subtitle: Copycat blocks allow you to make steps and panels out of things that typically cannot take those shapes.

quests.title: Welcome to All of Create!
quests.subtitle: [Click to read]
quests.description:
All of Create is based around Create, obviously, a steampunk mod that lets you build contraptions to do most things you can think of, just not how to do your laundry nor your homework, okay?

Create offers great guides for most of its items by hovering over them in REI or in your inventory and holding down 'W' to "ponder" the item, but sometimes it's just best to test each thing out, go big or go home, as the saying goes.

Because of this, the chapter is mostly focused on letting you know what exists and giving you a rough outline of the progression of the mod, but at the same time, it will not handhold you all the way to the end since Create is a free for all sandbox mechanic mod. Get building and be smarter.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: If given redstone power, it will pack items from the inventory connected into a package.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Diesel Generators are a compact way of generating kinetic energy.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Modular Diesel Generators function like normal Diesel generators. They can be stacked. They will generate stress proportionally to how much engines you stack.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Huge Diesel Engines connect to Shafts, they will start generating Kinetic Energy, once you give them some fuel.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Use to check for Crude Oil Deposits. Create Diesel Generators.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Use on a Diesel Engine to silence it. Create Diesel Generators.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Apply a Distillation Controller to a Fluid tank to create a Distillation Tower.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Use on a Diesel Engine make it faster. Create Diesel Generators.

quests.title: FE in create?

quests.subtitle: Finally, nuclear

quests.title: Strange rock?
quests.subtitle: You will need 12 blocks surronding a coil in order to maximize its energy generation

quests.title: Energy transporting
quests.subtitle: Put one on recieving end and input then connect with a wire

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Used to connect electrical connectors.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Basically electricity = speed

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Best of the best Magnets in store, however extremely expensive

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: "I am you, but stronger."

quests.title: Generating thorium
quests.subtitle: Mixing Thorium, Stone and Clay in water will generate thorium

quests.title: Untitled Quest

quests.subtitle: Foundational block for the reactor

quests.title: Inserting fuel

groups.title: Industry & Ordnance
groups.blurb: Dig deeper, forge bigger, and point the result at something.

chapters.title: Vein Delvers
chapters.subtitle: Find the infinite — sample, drill, extract, ascend

quests.title: Rumors of Endless Ore
quests.subtitle: Veins are chunk-bound truths.
quests.description:
The Finder does not lie — it merely refuses to dig for you.
Obtain a Vein Finder and right-click. Three chunks of destiny.

quests.title: Sample the Claim
quests.subtitle: Survey before cathedral.
quests.description:
Craft a Sample Drill. Confirm the vein before you mortgage your stress network.
Surveying is the polite word for 'do not dig a cathedral on a rumor.'
Confirm the vein. Then mortgage the stress network with dignity.

quests.title: Drilling Machine
quests.subtitle: Place it in the vein's chunk. Feed it RPM.
quests.description:
Craft a Drilling Machine. Medium Create speed (~30 RPM). Attach a bit. Pray to kinetics.
Place it in the vein's chunk. Medium Create speed — about thirty RPM of greed.
Attach a bit. Listen for geology surrendering.

quests.title: First Tooth
quests.subtitle: No bit, no bite.
quests.description:
Craft a Drill. Mount it. Listen for the song of infinite ore.
No bit, no bite. The machine is just an expensive paperweight until then.
Mount the tooth. The Delver's Guild keeps a ledger of first ores.

quests.title: Fluid Claim
quests.subtitle: Some chunks hide oceans underground.
quests.description:
Craft a Fluid Extractor for infinite fluid reservoirs. Greed has a pipe now.
Some chunks hide oceans underground. Greed has a pipe now.
Infinite fluid is still finite patience — label your tanks.

quests.title: Proof of Extraction
quests.subtitle: Bring tribute from the infinite.
quests.description:
Pull 32 Raw Iron from a vein. Paperwork for the Delver's Guild.
Paperwork for the Delver's Guild: raw iron is the accepted dialect.
Bring thirty-two. Less is a rumor; this is tribute.

quests.title: Diamond Persuasion
quests.subtitle: Harder veins. Harder teeth.
quests.description:
Craft a Diamond Drill. Soft bits are for soft rocks and softer egos.
Soft bits are for soft rocks and softer egos.
Diamond teeth open veins that iron only insults.

quests.title: Gemstone Tithe
quests.subtitle: The vein pays in sparkle.
quests.description:
Extract Raw Diamond from a precious vein. Proof you upgraded for a reason.
Proof you upgraded for a reason — sparkle that was not a daydream.
The vein pays in diamond. Collect the receipt.

quests.title: Netherite Persuasion
quests.subtitle: When diamond still complains.
quests.description:
Craft a Netherite Drill. Endgame teeth for endgame crust.
When diamond still complains, netherite answers in a lower register.
Endgame crust demands endgame manners.

quests.title: Vein Atlas
quests.subtitle: Cartography of the infinite.
quests.description:
Obtain a Vein Atlas. Map what you own. Name what you steal from geology.
Map what you own. Name what you steal from geology.
An atlas is how infinite ore becomes a strategy instead of a addiction.

chapters.title: Siegewrights
chapters.subtitle: Build the gun — load, fire, mount, escalate

quests.title: Letters of Marque
quests.subtitle: Idle powder is forbidden.
quests.description:
Craft a Cannon Builder. The Guild licenses loud mathematics.
Idle powder is forbidden — the Siegewrights keep a short temper and a long fuse.
The Cannon Builder is your letter of marque — hang it where apprentices can see.

quests.title: Cast Iron Heart
quests.subtitle: Chamber and end: first skeleton.
quests.description:
Craft a Wrought Iron Cannon Chamber and End. The barrel comes later; the heart comes first.
Chamber and end: the first skeleton of every serious gun.
The barrel comes later. The heart comes first.

quests.title: Powder and Shot
quests.subtitle: Trajectory is mandatory.
quests.description:
Craft Powder Charge and Solid Shot. A gun without ammo is a very expensive flute.
A gun without ammo is a very expensive flute.
Powder Charge and Solid Shot — trajectory is mandatory.

quests.title: First Salvo
quests.subtitle: Fire once. Prefer the horizon.
quests.description:
Assemble, load, and fire. Check when the silence afterward feels earned.
If you hit a friend's base, the Guide will remember.

quests.title: Siege Mobility
quests.subtitle: A static cannon is a loud statue.
quests.description:
Craft a Cannon Carriage. Bring the argument to them.
A static cannon is a loud statue. Mobility is doctrine.
Bring the argument to them — or admit you are landscaping.

quests.title: Kinetic Mount
quests.subtitle: Let Create aim what shoulders should not.
quests.description:
Craft a Cannon Mount. RPM is a better gunner than panic.
RPM is a better gunner than panic.
Let Create aim what shoulders should not.

quests.title: Steel Barrel
quests.subtitle: Tier up the temple of Newton.
quests.description:
Craft a Steel Cannon Barrel. Soft iron was a draft.
Soft iron was a draft. Steel is the published edition.
Tier up the temple of Newton.

quests.title: Loader's Creed
quests.subtitle: Automation belongs on the gun deck.
quests.description:
Craft a Cannon Loader. Hands are for steering, not stuffing powder forever.
Hands are for steering, not stuffing powder forever.
Automation belongs on the gun deck — the Loader's Creed.

quests.title: High Explosive Doctrine
quests.subtitle: Solid shot was polite.
quests.description:
Craft an HE Shell. The horizon will notice.
Solid shot was polite. HE is a conversation starter.
The horizon will notice. So will your neighbors.

quests.title: Welder's Oath
quests.subtitle: Built-up guns demand built-up craft.
quests.description:
Craft a Cannon Welder. Late barrels are assembled, not wished.
Late barrels are assembled, not wished into existence.
Built-up guns demand built-up craft — swear the Welder's Oath.

chapters.title: Addon Guildhalls
chapters.subtitle: Signposts to Create addon chapters

quests.title: Ink of Industry
quests.subtitle: Experience can be bottled. Enchantment can be engineered.
quests.description:
There is a guildhall where XP becomes fluid and anvils learn manners.
Open the Enchantment Industry chapter when you are ready to multiclass Artificer and Spellwright.
Check this when you have paid that hall a visit — ink and industry share a roof.

quests.title: Lenses of Truth
quests.subtitle: Light keeps secrets. Lenses steal them.
quests.description:
Visit the Optical chapter. Learn what beams can carry when they are taught to behave.
Lenses steal secrets that light meant to keep — the guildhall of glass and truth.
Check this after you have found it and left wiser.

quests.title: Kinetic Heresies
quests.subtitle: Heresy is just innovation with better branding.
quests.description:
Create Connected expands the gospel of kinetics with parts the old manuals forgot.
Heresy is just innovation with better branding — visit that chapter.
Check this when you return wiser — or more dangerous.

quests.title: Depthwrights
quests.subtitle: The ocean does not care about your schedule.
quests.description:
The ocean does not care about your schedule — Depthwrights build anyway.
Visit the Aquatic / undersea Create guildhall and learn pressure as a coworker.
Check this when salt has entered your blueprints.

quests.title: Cakes of War
quests.subtitle: War runs on snacks.
quests.description:
War runs on snacks — Cakes of War is not a metaphor, it is logistics.
Visit the Big Brain Fuels / cake-power chapter and accept the absurdity.
Check this when your furnaces smell like celebration.

quests.title: Factory of Immortality
quests.subtitle: Immortality, but make it a production line.
quests.description:
Immortality, but make it a production line — the Totem factory awaits.
Visit that guildhall when death has become a recurring calendar event.
Check this after you have seen how Create argues with mortality.

quests.title: Echo Works
quests.subtitle: Even silence can be industrialized.
quests.description:
Even silence can be industrialized — Echo Works listens to the Deep Dark.
Visit the Deep Dark Create chapter and learn what sculk wants from kinetics.
Check this when the quiet has a machine sound.

groups.title: Logistics & Travel
groups.blurb: Rail, road, sea, and sky. Move everything, everywhere.

quests.title: Forecasting a Train's arrival
quests.subtitle: Forecast a Train's arrival on your Display Board with the help of your Display Links

quests.title: Field Trip
quests.subtitle: Leave a Train Seat over 5000 blocks away from where you started travelling

quests.title: Track Factory
quests.subtitle: Produce more than 1000 Train Tracks with the same Mechanical Press

quests.title: Dimensional Commuter
quests.subtitle: Ride a Train through a portal

quests.title: Choo Choo!
quests.subtitle: Assemble a Steam Whistle to your Train and activate it while driving

quests.title: Road Kill
quests.subtitle: Run over an enemy with your train

quests.title: Blind Spot
quests.subtitle: Crash into another Train while driving backwards

quests.title: Expert Driver
quests.subtitle: Run a red Train Signal

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Slow but easy to maneuver. Immersive Aircraft

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Slow and fuel hungry but carries an entire storage

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Fast and rather reliable. Make sure your runway is long enough

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Muscle-powered copter. Give it a good push and off it flies!

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A flying fortress, slow but heavily armed

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: +50% Takeoff speed

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: +100% Durability

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: +3% Stabilizing -100% Wind affect Mechanical Dashboard

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: +3% Stabilizing -100% Wind effect Electronic dashboard

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: +3% Stabilizing -100% Wind effect

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: +10% Engine powers

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: -20% Fuel requirement

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: +25% Engine power +50% Fuel requirement

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: +40% Engine power +30% Fuel requirement

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: -20% Engine power -75% fuel requirement

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: -75% Air friction

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A bulkier version of the Spyglass

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A heavy crossbow with a powerful punch, requires arrows

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Fast-firing cannon running with gunpowder

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Perfect for building, and thats about it

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: Used to control the speed of Minecarts or Minecart Contraptions

chapters.title: Rubber Road
chapters.subtitle: Automobility — assemble, fuel the myth, drive

quests.title: Garage Writ
quests.subtitle: Trains have schedules. Cars have vibes.
quests.description:
Craft an Automobile Assembler. The Rubber Road begins with a bench and denial.
Trains have schedules. Cars have vibes — and denial.
The Rubber Road begins with a bench. Everything else is improvisation.

quests.title: Frame First
quests.subtitle: Everything hangs on the bones.
quests.description:
Craft an Automobile Frame. Style points are optional; structural integrity is not.
Style points are optional; structural integrity is not.
Everything hangs on the bones. Choose a frame you can trust at speed.

quests.title: Wheel Gospel
quests.subtitle: Four circles. Infinite regrets.
quests.description:
Craft Automobile Wheels. Round is the correct religion.
Round is the correct religion. Four circles, infinite regrets.
Craft the wheels. Confess your sins to the road later.

quests.title: Engine Hymn
quests.subtitle: Noise as a lifestyle choice.
quests.description:
Craft an Automobile Engine. The louder the sermon, the clearer the prophecy.
Noise as a lifestyle choice. The louder the sermon, the clearer the prophecy.
Bolt the engine in like you mean the chorus.

quests.title: First Assembly
quests.subtitle: Bolt the dream together.
quests.description:
Use the Assembler to combine frame, engine, and wheels into a working automobile.
Check when it moves under its own poor decisions.

quests.title: Crowbar Diplomacy
quests.subtitle: Modding is a love language.
quests.description:
Obtain a Crowbar. Cars are opinions that can be rearranged.
Cars are opinions that can be rearranged.
Modding is a love language — speak it with a crowbar.

quests.title: Pressure Plate Pit
quests.subtitle: Garage security for people with enemies.
quests.description:
Craft an Automobile Pressure Plate. Parking is a trap and a flex.
Parking is a trap and a flex.
Garage security for people with enemies — and friends who 'borrow.'

quests.title: Open Road
quests.subtitle: Leave tire marks on the campaign map.
quests.description:
Drive to a distant biome and return. Check when the rubber road feels like yours.
Leave tire marks on the campaign map.
Drive to a distant biome and return. The road only becomes yours after the loop.

chapters.title: Salt & Sail
chapters.subtitle: Small Ships — canvas, hull, fleet, broadside

quests.title: Cloth Before Keel
quests.subtitle: No sail, no ship — Small Ships law.
quests.description:
Rowboats are ghosts in this build. The craftable path starts with canvas.
Craft a Sail from wool, logs, and lead. Every hull downstream needs it.

quests.title: Humble Boats
quests.subtitle: Three keels for one ambition.
quests.description:
Craft 3 Oak Boats. Small Ships eats vanilla boats for breakfast.
Small Ships eats vanilla boats for breakfast — feed it three oak keels.
Humble wood becomes ambition the moment canvas touches it.

quests.title: Maiden Voyage
quests.subtitle: The Cog is the honest starter hull.
quests.description:
Craft an Oak Cog — sail, leads, and three oak boats.
Name it something embarrassing. Superstition prefers comedy.

quests.title: Longship Ambition
quests.subtitle: Viking math: more wood, more legend.
quests.description:
Craft an Oak Drakkar. Chests, leads, string, sail — and pride.
Viking math: more wood, more legend.
Chests, leads, string, sail — and enough pride to name the longship.

quests.title: Harbor Compact
quests.subtitle: Trade follows a longer keel.
quests.description:
Craft an Oak Galley. A cog proves you float; a galley proves you mean business.
A cog proves you float; a galley proves you mean business.
Trade follows a longer keel. Harbor contracts prefer galleys.

quests.title: Brigantine Writ
quests.subtitle: When the coast is not enough.
quests.description:
Craft an Oak Brigg — the proper deep-water argument.
When the coast is not enough, the Brigg is the proper deep-water argument.
Deep blue does not respect shy hulls.

quests.title: Ship Cannon
quests.subtitle: Diplomacy with a fuse.
quests.description:
Craft a Ship Cannon. Saltwater and gunpowder are a lifestyle.
Saltwater and gunpowder are a lifestyle.
Diplomacy with a fuse — mount it where boarding parties can read the message.

quests.title: Powder for the Tide
quests.subtitle: Balls of negotiation.
quests.description:
Craft 8 Cannon Balls. Stock the magazine before the pirates stock you.
Stock the magazine before the pirates stock you.
Balls of negotiation. Eight is a polite opening offer.

quests.title: Admiral Emeritus
quests.subtitle: The harbor knows your silhouette.
quests.description:
Outfit a ship with cannon and sail a full loop of the coast.
Check when the salt in your inventory feels earned.

chapters.title: Glass Arteries
chapters.subtitle: Hypertubes — pipe the player like a package

quests.title: Pneumatic Prophecy
quests.subtitle: Why walk when the base can swallow you?
quests.description:
Craft Hypertube. Glass arteries for people who hate stairs.
Why walk when the base can swallow you?
Glass arteries for people who hate stairs — and love velocity.

quests.title: Mouth of the Tube
quests.subtitle: Every artery needs an entrance wound.
quests.description:
Craft a Hypertube Entrance. Step in. Become logistics.
Every artery needs an entrance wound.
Step in. Become logistics. Try not to wave at yourself mid-flight.

quests.title: First Swallow
quests.subtitle: Survive the inaugural launch.
quests.description:
Connect entrance to tube and travel at least once. Check when you stop screaming.
Survive the inaugural launch. Screaming is traditional.
Check when you stop screaming — or when screaming becomes the soundtrack.

quests.title: Accelerator Creed
quests.subtitle: Faster is a personality trait.
quests.description:
Craft a Hypertube Accelerator. Velocity is free if you ignore physics.
Faster is a personality trait.
Velocity is free if you ignore physics. The Accelerator does not ignore you.

quests.title: Scanner's Eye
quests.subtitle: Know who is in the pipe.
quests.description:
Craft a Tube Scanner Attachment. Surveillance, but make it kinetic.
Know who is in the pipe.
Surveillance, but make it kinetic — the Scanner's Eye never blinks.

quests.title: Redstone Pulse
quests.subtitle: Detect the flying fools.
quests.description:
Craft a Redstone Detector Tube Attachment. Automation deserves receipts.
Detect the flying fools.
Automation deserves receipts. Redstone keeps the ledger.

quests.title: Campus Circuit
quests.subtitle: Link farm, forge, and bed in one scream-line.
quests.description:
Build a multi-stop hypertube network across your base. Check when walking feels optional.
Link farm, forge, and bed in one scream-line.
Check when walking feels optional — and slightly insulting.

chapters.title: Personal Relics
chapters.subtitle: Jetpack — vertical freedom with Create manners

quests.title: Backborne Ambition
quests.subtitle: Wings are for dragons. You have brass.
quests.description:
Craft a Create Jetpack. Fuel it. Ascend like a responsible menace.
Wings are for dragons. You have brass.
Fuel it. Ascend like a responsible menace.

quests.title: First Hover
quests.subtitle: Falling is still an option. Choose otherwise.
quests.description:
Take off, hover, and land without becoming a crater. Check when dignity survives.
Falling is still an option. Choose otherwise.
Take off, hover, land. Dignity is the real fuel gauge.

quests.title: Netherite Ascent
quests.subtitle: Soft brass was a draft of flight.
quests.description:
Craft a Netherite Jetpack. Endgame lift for endgame mistakes.
Soft brass was a draft of flight.
Netherite lift for endgame mistakes — and intentional ones.

quests.title: Sky Survey
quests.subtitle: See your empire from above.
quests.description:
Fly a full circuit of your base perimeter. Check when the map feels smaller.
See your empire from above.
Fly a full circuit of the perimeter. Watch the map shrink.

chapters.title: Skywright's Leviathan
chapters.subtitle: Create Aeronautics — lift, thrust, cannons, flying hold

quests.title: Aviator's Writ
quests.subtitle: See stress. See weight. See destiny.
quests.description:
Craft Aviator's Goggles — the Skywright's upgraded Engineer's Goggles.
Wiki: they show SU, block weight, and physics tips when you look at components.
Wear them. The Leviathan begins as information, not timber.

quests.title: Honey Compact
quests.subtitle: Super Glue's ambitious cousin.
quests.description:
Craft Honey Glue (spout honey onto an iron sheet — check JEI).
Wiki: selection works like Schematic & Quill — Alt corner, Ctrl+scroll faces.
Overlapping honey regions merge on assemble. Barely-touching regions do not.

quests.title: Physics Assembler
quests.subtitle: The altar where blocks become a body.
quests.description:
Craft a Physics Assembler — Simulated's core assembly block.
Wiki: it grabs itself and the block below; honey/super glue regions ride along.
Large ships outgrow the block limit — assemble, then build outward on the live hull.

quests.title: Diagram of Forces
quests.subtitle: Lift, thrust, and regret — visualized.
quests.description:
Craft a Contraption Diagram.
Wiki: right-click a simulated contraption to visualize forces acting on it.
Use it before you blame the sky. The sky keeps receipts.

quests.title: First Physics
quests.subtitle: Confirm the world still has laws.
quests.description:
Honey-glue a tiny platform, place the Assembler, and throw the assemble lever.
Disassemble and reassemble once. Check when the physics body feels real.
Creative test pads are legal. Crashing your survival base is a lifestyle choice.

quests.title: Grab Handle
quests.subtitle: Hold the ship before it holds you.
quests.description:
Craft an Iron Handle (or any dyed Handle).
Wiki: hold right-click to grab; sneak-grab moves the contraption; scroll adjusts distance.
Mount handles where crew need to haul, dock, or panic with dignity.

quests.title: Engine Assembly
quests.subtitle: Saw. Press. Repeat. Become loud.
quests.description:
Craft an Engine Assembly (Create pressing/sawing chain on iron sheets — JEI).
This is the heart of every Portable Engine. Keep extras; ships eat hearts.

quests.title: Portable Heart
quests.subtitle: Onboard RPM without a windmill farm.
quests.description:
Craft a Portable Engine (Blast Furnace + Engine Assembly + Iron Sheet).
Wiki: furnace fuels work; Blaze Cakes superheat — 2048 SU @ 32 RPM, or 4096 @ 64.
Mount it on the hull. Belts and shafts are still Create — only the floor is freer.

quests.title: Envelope Tithe
quests.subtitle: Wool and sticks become sky.
quests.description:
Craft 32 Hot Air Envelopes (white / undyed).
Wiki: two wool + two sticks → four envelopes. Dye later; airtight volume first.
Envelopes bounce fall damage — useful when your prototype becomes a teaching moment.

quests.title: Hot Air Burner
quests.subtitle: Redstone fills the balloon. No coal required.
quests.description:
Craft a Hot Air Burner (Adjustable Burner).
Wiki: powered by redstone; fills enclosed envelope volume from the top down.
Side panels set max volume (5–500 m³). Signal strength scales fill toward that max.

quests.title: Balloon Prototype
quests.subtitle: Hover is a personality trait.
quests.description:
Build an airtight envelope balloon over a Hot Air Burner on a simulated hull.
Power the burner. Confirm lift on the Contraption Diagram. Land without a crater.
Check when you can take off, hover, and settle on the same pad.

quests.title: Wooden Propeller
quests.subtitle: Two blades. Honest thrust.
quests.description:
Craft a Wooden Propeller — early directional thrust.
Spin it from behind with Create kinetics. Point the face where you want to go.
Light craft only. Leviathans will laugh — then demand andesite.

quests.title: Andesite Propeller
quests.subtitle: Four blades. Real ambitions.
quests.description:
Craft an Andesite Propeller.
Wiki: ~31.4 propulsion units at 32 RPM; SU cost scales as 4 × RPM.
Pair with a Portable Engine. Balance thrust below the center of lift or enjoy looping.

quests.title: Propeller Bearing
quests.subtitle: Spin a whole sail-disk, not one lonely blade.
quests.description:
Craft a Propeller Bearing.
Wiki: needs rotational power from the back; attach ≥2 sail-like blocks (sails/wool).
Thrust scales with sails and RPM. Side-configure thrust direction. No unwanted torque!

quests.title: Symmetric Sail
quests.subtitle: Canvas that means business.
quests.description:
Craft Symmetric Sails for propeller assemblies (or dye a white one).
Mount at least two on a Propeller Bearing. Pretty ships still need physics.

quests.title: Helm & Throttle
quests.subtitle: Hands on the sky.
quests.description:
Craft a Steering Wheel and a Throttle Lever.
Wiki: hold use on the wheel — mouse yaw becomes shaft rotation (Shift snaps 45°).
Throttle governs analog power to engines/propellers. Label your bridge like adults.

quests.title: First Free Flight
quests.subtitle: Leave the pad. Return with a story.
quests.description:
Fly a craft with lift (balloon and/or props) plus forward thrust and helm control.
Travel to a distant biome landmark and return. No creative flight cheats.
Check when the Diagram no longer looks like a crime scene.

quests.title: Gyroscopic Mechanism
quests.subtitle: Brass that remembers upright.
quests.description:
Craft a Gyroscopic Mechanism (Create sequencing — JEI).
Required for Gyroscopic Propeller Bearings — the stabilizer of serious hulls.

quests.title: Gyro Bearing
quests.subtitle: Auto-leveling for people who hate rolling.
quests.description:
Craft a Gyroscopic Propeller Bearing (slab + Gyro Mechanism + Brass Casing).
Wiki: tilts up to 12° to fight pitch/roll when props sit above/below CoM.
Redstone lock freezes it into a normal Propeller Bearing. Use for combat runs.

quests.title: Smart Propeller
quests.subtitle: Thrust that tries to look at the sky.
quests.description:
Craft a Smart Propeller.
Wiki: generates thrust when spun; pitches to face upwards; wrench reverses thrust.
Excellent for VTOL attitudes and mid-air attitude recovery on fat hulls.

quests.title: Steam Vent
quests.subtitle: Boilers can fill balloons too.
quests.description:
Craft a Steam Vent — alternate lift source for envelope volumes.
Wiki: multiple vents/burners can fill the same balloon, stacking speed and volume.
Route Create steam like a civilized skywright. Condensation is for groundlings.

quests.title: End Dust
quests.subtitle: The void's baking flour.
quests.description:
Obtain End Stone Powder — Levitite feedstock.
Bring the End's dust home. The Leviathan's magic keel starts as powder.

quests.title: Levitite Blend
quests.subtitle: Heated mixing. Floating ambition.
quests.description:
Produce Levitite Blend (heated mixing — wiki: powders/fluids per JEI).
Bucket it. Pour molds. Keep clay sacrificial — curing breaks clay forms.

quests.title: Levitite Keel
quests.subtitle: Anti-gravity for battleship mass.
quests.description:
Cure Levitite: place blend source blocks, light fire/campfire nearby.
Wiki: 10kpg anti-gravity + unique low-speed drag. Soul fire → Pearlescent variant.
Stockpile Levitite blocks under the deck. Heavy guns need magic buoyancy.

quests.title: Name the Leviathan
quests.subtitle: Untitled ships sink in the paperwork.
quests.description:
Craft a Nameplate and set the contraption's name.
Wiki: right-click to edit; dye recolors; honeycomb locks; plates sync the ship name.
Pick a name you would paint on the prow before the cannons go loud.

quests.title: Navigation Table
quests.subtitle: Charts for people who refuse to get lost at altitude.
quests.description:
Craft a Navigation Table for the bridge.
Mount it near helm and throttle. Portable bases need a place to plan the next raid.

quests.title: Linked Bridge
quests.subtitle: Fly from a chair. Or a panic room.
quests.description:
Craft a Linked Typewriter.
Wiki: bind redstone-link frequencies to keys; Linked Controller copies bindings.
Wire burners, prop locks, and cannon safeties. Remote command is a survival trait.

quests.title: Docking Writ
quests.subtitle: Airports are optional. Latches are not.
quests.description:
Craft a Docking Connector (and preferably a Paired Docking Connector).
Secure the Leviathan to a tower, cliff, or sister ship without creative praying.

quests.title: Potato Broadside
quests.subtitle: Practice ordnance for polite skies.
quests.description:
Craft a Mounted Potato Cannon (Aeronautics).
Test gun mounts and recoil manners before you weld real CBC steel to the hull.

quests.title: Cannon Mount
quests.subtitle: RPM aims what shoulders should not.
quests.description:
Craft a Create Big Cannons Cannon Mount.
Bolt it to the simulated deck. Kinetic aiming belongs on a battleship.
Siegewrights chapter recommended — but the Leviathan demands its own mount.

quests.title: Siege Heart
quests.subtitle: Chamber and end — shipboard edition.
quests.description:
Craft a Wrought Iron Cannon Chamber and Cannon End for the first broadside gun.
Assemble on the mount with powder and shot. Prefer the horizon to friendly balloons.

quests.title: Flying Hold
quests.subtitle: A base that moves when the map gets rude.
quests.description:
Outfit the Leviathan as a portable hold: bed/spawn, storage chests, crafting/Create station,
food stores, and a Waystone or return plan. Live aboard for a full day-night cycle.
Check when the ship is home — not a joyride with cannons.

quests.title: Leviathan Emeritus
quests.subtitle: Battleship. Base. Ballad complete.
quests.description:
Prove the full Skywright doctrine: Levitite-buoyed (or balloon) hull, propulsion, helm,
at least one mounted CBC gun that can fire, and a livable interior.
Fly a combat patrol and return to dock. Check when the Guide stamps your airship papers.

groups.title: Hearth & Harvest
groups.blurb: Feed the crew, brew the calm, and make home worth defending.

quests.title: Welcome to Create Kitchen
quests.subtitle: Welcome to Create Kitchen! It includes three different types of mods designed to help you automate food production, cooking, and farming

quests.title: Craft Basket - cutting board and Mechanical arm and Mechanical saw
quests.subtitle: The Basket and Cutting Board can be supported by the Mechanical Arm and Mechanical saw to manage numerous tasks, including supplying ingredients and cooking

quests.title: Craft Slicer
quests.subtitle: The Slicer is is like Automatic Cutting for use for cutting ingredients

quests.title: Craft Sprinkler
quests.subtitle: The Sprinkler is a block that distributes fluid over a small area below when supplied via a pipe

quests.title: Craft Fishing Net
quests.subtitle: The Fishing Net is a contraption component designed to catch small aquatic animals while also allowing fishing at the same time

quests.title: Craft Roost
quests.subtitle: Fast-track poultry product output from chickens, various chicken types, and ducks

quests.title: Activate the Sprinkler by using a Water bucket or connecting a fluid tank
quests.subtitle: Water makes the area below wet, making the world think it's raining there

quests.title: Activate the Sprinkler by using a lava bucket or connecting a fluid tank
quests.subtitle: Lava applies a small amount of fire damage to entities below

quests.title: Activate the Sprinkler by using a Liquid Fertilizer or Connecting Fluid tank
quests.subtitle: Liquid Fertilizer, a new fluid, applies a bonemeal affect to blocks

quests.title: Activate the Sprinkler by using a Potions or Connecting Fluid tank
Insert axes or knives into the Slicer
quests.subtitle: For cutting food

quests.title: Use Mechanical Mixer as a Automatic Cooking
quests.subtitle: All recipes from Farmer's delight requiring the Cooking Pot are added as heated mixing recipes

quests.title: Craft Sandwich Station
quests.subtitle: A Create add-on for crafting custom sandwiches.
