quests.title: Obtain Burger
quests.subtitle: After crafting your first Chicken Sandwich, you gain access to a wide range of custom sandwich recipes, allowing you to create your own unique burgers

chapters.title: Pantry of Many Seeds
chapters.subtitle: Pam's Crops — plant the empire's groceries

quests.title: Tomato Doctrine
quests.subtitle: Red is a seasoning and a personality.
quests.description:
Obtain Tomatoes. Soup begins with ambition and acid.
Soup begins with ambition and acid.
Red is a seasoning and a personality — stock the doctrine.

quests.title: Corn Gospel
quests.subtitle: Yellow gold that feeds armies.
quests.description:
Harvest Corn. The hearthkeeper's first surplus.
Yellow gold that feeds armies.
The hearthkeeper's first surplus — corn in the chest means winter blinks first.

quests.title: Lettuce Compact
quests.subtitle: Crunch is a food group.
quests.description:
Obtain Lettuce. Salads are diplomacy for herbivores and cowards alike.
Crunch is a food group.
Salads are diplomacy for herbivores and cowards alike — keep lettuce ready.

quests.title: Barley Tithe
quests.subtitle: Beer dreams start as grain.
quests.description:
Obtain Barley. The pantry respects fermentation ambitions.
Beer dreams start as grain.
The pantry respects fermentation ambitions. Barley is the opening prayer.

quests.title: Onion Tears
quests.subtitle: Chopping builds character.
quests.description:
Obtain Onions. Flavor is violence done correctly.
Chopping builds character.
Flavor is violence done correctly — onions are the first lesson.

quests.title: Rice Fields
quests.subtitle: Patience in water.
quests.description:
Obtain Rice. Staple crops are how civilizations survive winters.
Patience in water.
Staple crops are how civilizations survive winters — and sieges.

quests.title: Seed Vault
quests.subtitle: Tomorrow's famine is today's paperwork.
quests.description:
Stock Tomato Seeds and Corn Seeds. A pantry without seeds is a museum.
Tomorrow's famine is today's paperwork.
A pantry without seeds is a museum. Stock the vault.

quests.title: Market Day
quests.subtitle: Surplus is power.
quests.description:
Fill a chest with mixed Pam's produce. Check when the kitchen stops complaining.
Surplus is power.
Fill a chest with mixed Pam's produce. The kitchen notices silence first.

chapters.title: Tea & Temper
chapters.subtitle: Farmer's Respite — brew calm, then caffeine

quests.title: Kettle Covenant
quests.subtitle: Hot water is a civil right.
quests.description:
Craft a Kettle. Civilization is measured in steeping time.
Hot water is a civil right.
Civilization is measured in steeping time — craft the kettle.

quests.title: Green Leaf Tithe
quests.subtitle: Calm before the storm.
quests.description:
Obtain Green Tea Leaves. Soft power in a sack.
Calm before the storm.
Soft power in a sack — green leaves for the temperate.

quests.title: First Steep
quests.subtitle: Patience tastes like grass and wisdom.
quests.description:
Brew Green Tea. Drink it. Pretend you are unbothered.
Patience tastes like grass and wisdom.
Drink it. Pretend you are unbothered. The Guide is watching.

quests.title: Coffee Berries
quests.subtitle: The opposite of calm.
quests.description:
Obtain Coffee Berries. The night shift has a botanical sponsor.
The opposite of calm.
The night shift has a botanical sponsor — gather the berries.

quests.title: Black Wake
quests.subtitle: Productivity with consequences.
quests.description:
Brew Coffee. The Guide does not judge. The Guide also does not sleep.
Productivity with consequences.
The Guide does not judge. The Guide also does not sleep.

quests.title: Black Tea Diplomacy
quests.subtitle: For guests who fear green.
quests.description:
Brew Black Tea. Offer it before negotiations. Or after apologies.
For guests who fear green.
Offer it before negotiations — or after apologies.

quests.title: Gambler's Brew
quests.subtitle: Luck in a cup. Results vary.
quests.description:
Brew Gambler's Tea. Roll the dice. Accept the flavor.
Luck in a cup. Results vary.
Roll the dice. Accept the flavor. Blame the kettle if needed.

quests.title: Tea Service
quests.subtitle: Host a proper sitting.
quests.description:
Serve tea or coffee to another player (or a very patient villager).
Check when the kettle has earned its keep.

chapters.title: Hold Beautification
chapters.subtitle: Comforts — sleep anywhere, nap with style

quests.title: Bedroll Compact
quests.subtitle: Spawn points for people with wanderlust.
quests.description:
Craft a Red Sleeping Bag. Home is wherever you unroll dignity.
Spawn points for people with wanderlust.
Home is wherever you unroll dignity — preferably not in lava.

quests.title: Rope and Nail
quests.subtitle: Hammocks need hardware, not hope.
quests.description:
Craft Rope and Nail. Physics still applies; style is optional.
Hammocks need hardware, not hope.
Physics still applies; style is optional.

quests.title: Hammock Law
quests.subtitle: Nap elevated. Literally.
quests.description:
Craft a White Hammock. Suspend yourself above your problems.
Nap elevated. Literally.
Suspend yourself above your problems — and your floor-plan regrets.

quests.title: Field Nap
quests.subtitle: Sleep away from the bed you built.
quests.description:
Spend a night in a sleeping bag or hammock outside your main bed room.
Check when the hold feels portable.

groups.title: Champions of the Realm
groups.blurb: Monsters, dungeons, and the gear that outlives them.

chapters.title: Arms Practice
chapters.subtitle: Stance, spoils, forged gear, curios

quests.title: Stance & Steel
quests.subtitle: Button-mashers die in ditches.
quests.description:
Craft an Iron Longsword (Simply Swords). Better Combat teaches new verbs — learn them.
Button-mashers die in ditches.
Learn the new verbs before the night learns your hitbox.

quests.title: Blooded Edge
quests.subtitle: Flesh in the pack. Stance stuck.
quests.description:
Clear the restless until your inventory proves it.
Bring 16 Rotten Flesh — no spectators, no excuses.

quests.title: Skeleton Syllabus
quests.subtitle: Ranged pressure. Keep dancing.
quests.description:
Harvest the archers of the night. Bring 16 Bones as tuition.
Ranged pressure. Keep dancing.
Sixteen bones as tuition — the yard does not take auditors.

quests.title: Forge Your Legend
quests.subtitle: Mass-produced steel is for NPCs.
quests.description:
Obtain a Silent Gear Sword Blueprint. Your blade should have a birth certificate.
Mass-produced steel is for NPCs.
Your blade should have a birth certificate — Silent Gear listens.

quests.title: Second Skin
quests.subtitle: Fashion is armor that flatters.
quests.description:
Craft Immersive Armors Warrior Helmet. Look dangerous on purpose.
Fashion is armor that flatters.
Look dangerous on purpose. Warrior helm optional; confidence mandatory.

quests.title: Relic Hunter
quests.subtitle: Power hides in curios.
quests.description:
Find an Artifacts Crystal Heart. Wear proof that luck likes you.
Power hides in curios.
Wear proof that luck likes you — Crystal Heart as character sheet.

quests.title: Shield Wall
quests.subtitle: Offense without a plan is a funeral.
quests.description:
Craft a Shield. Block something that wanted you dead.
Offense without a plan is a funeral.
Block something that wanted you dead. Then smirk.

quests.title: Petty Familiar
quests.subtitle: Serious parties die of seriousness.
quests.description:
Obtain Adorable Hamster sunflower seeds. Morale is a combat stat.
Serious parties die of seriousness.
Morale is a combat stat — sunflower seeds are the soft ammo.

quests.title: Arms Graduate
quests.subtitle: The yard acknowledges you.
quests.description:
Wear full armor and carry your longsword into a night fight. Check when you return.
The yard acknowledges you.
Full armor, longsword, night fight. Return with a story, not a respawn.

chapters.title: Bestiary of Nightmares
chapters.subtitle: First wild mutant → brew Chemical X → catalog → wilds → Cataclysm → Illagers

quests.title: First Nightmare
quests.subtitle: Wild mutants exist before the bottle does.
quests.description:
Hunt a natural Mutant Zombie and claim the Hulk Hammer.
Chemical X needs a mutant drop to brew — so the first nightmare must be found, not bottled.

quests.title: Mutagen Writ
quests.subtitle: Thick potion + mutant drop. Then gunpowder.
quests.description:
Chemical X is not a standalone item — it is a potion.
Brew a Thick Potion with a Hulk Hammer, Creeper Shard, Skeleton Skull, or Endersoul Hand.
Add Gunpowder for a Splash Potion of Chemical X. Bring that splash bottle as proof.

quests.title: Mutant Catalog: Creeper
quests.subtitle: Explosion with opinions.
quests.description:
Splash Chemical X on a creeper — or hunt a wild one — and claim a Creeper Shard.
Explosion with opinions.
Catalog entry: Creeper — wild or bottled. Shard required.

quests.title: Mutant Catalog: Skeleton
quests.subtitle: Bones that refuse the script.
quests.description:
Create or hunt a Mutant Skeleton and take its Skull.
Bones that refuse the script.
Catalog entry: Skeleton — take the skull. File it under 'rude.'

quests.title: Songs of the Wild
quests.subtitle: The jungle remembers Mowzie.
quests.description:
Face Mowzie's wilds and return with a Naga Fang.
The jungle remembers Mowzie.
Return with a Naga Fang — the wilds keep receipts in enamel.

quests.title: Wrought Judgment
quests.subtitle: Iron that learned to walk.
quests.description:
Claim a Wrought Axe from Mowzie's iron titans. Heavy proof.
Iron that learned to walk.
Heavy proof from iron titans — the axe is the signature.

quests.title: Flame Eye Omen
quests.subtitle: Craft the eye that opens the furnace.
quests.description:
Craft a Flame Eye — Cataclysm's invitation. The eye is omen; Ignis is sermon.
The eye is omen; Ignis is sermon.
Craft Cataclysm's invitation. Do not RSVP lightly.

quests.title: Ignis Writ
quests.subtitle: When the Nether cracks, answer.
quests.description:
Defeat Ignis and bring Ignitium Ingots from the pyre.
When the Nether cracks, answer.
Ignitium from the pyre — inventory proof only.

quests.title: Ignis Encore
quests.subtitle: A disc for the ashes.
quests.description:
Obtain Ignis's music disc — proof the fight had a soundtrack.
A disc for the ashes.
Proof the fight had a soundtrack — and that you lived to hear the encore.

quests.title: Illager Accords
quests.subtitle: The Banner remains.
quests.description:
Survive Illager Invasion pressure and claim a Horn of Sight.
The Banner remains.
Illager Invasion pressure — claim the Horn of Sight and the last word.

chapters.title: Depths, Caves & Other Realms
chapters.subtitle: Ancient City → Otherside → Galosphere → Starlight

quests.title: Quiet City
quests.subtitle: Bring wool. Bring courage.
quests.description:
Obtain an Echo Shard from an Ancient City. The city keeps receipts in sculk.
Bring wool. Bring courage.
The Ancient City keeps receipts in sculk — Echo Shard is the stamp.

quests.title: Heart of the Deep
quests.subtitle: The dark has a basement.
quests.description:
Obtain the Heart of the Deep — key to Deeper Darker.
The dark has a basement.
Heart of the Deep — key to Deeper Darker, and to worse decisions.

quests.title: Otherside Crossing
quests.subtitle: Resonarium is the stamp in your passport.
quests.description:
Cross into the Otherside and return with Resonarium. No ore, no crossing on the books.
Resonarium is the stamp in your passport.
No ore, no crossing on the books. The Otherside keeps score.

quests.title: Bloom Offering
quests.subtitle: Even the Otherside grows fruit.
quests.description:
Obtain Bloom Berries from Deeper Darker's flora. Sweet proof of a hard trip.
Even the Otherside grows fruit.
Sweet proof of a hard trip — Bloom Berries in the satchel.

quests.title: Reinforced Echo
quests.subtitle: Sculk remade into resolve.
quests.description:
Obtain a Reinforced Echo Shard. The deep answers those who listen twice.
Sculk remade into resolve.
The deep answers those who listen twice — Reinforced Echo.

quests.title: Galosphere Compact
quests.subtitle: Crystal caverns keep prettier secrets.
quests.description:
Obtain a Pink Salt Shard from Galosphere caverns.
Crystal caverns keep prettier secrets.
Pink Salt Shard — Galosphere's calling card.

quests.title: Lumiere Proof
quests.subtitle: Light that should not be mined — yet is.
quests.description:
Obtain a Lumiere Block. Pocket a star from underground.
Light that should not be mined — yet is.
Pocket a star from underground. Lumiere does not apologize.

quests.title: Starlight Crossing
quests.subtitle: Foreign fruit. Honest cartography.
quests.description:
Enter Eternal Starlight and bring Lunar Berries home.
Foreign fruit. Honest cartography.
Eternal Starlight stamps passports in Lunar Berries.

quests.title: Aethersent
quests.subtitle: Metal from a foreign heaven.
quests.description:
Obtain an Aethersent Ingot. Smelt the sky's opinion of you.
Metal from a foreign heaven.
Smelt the sky's opinion of you — Aethersent.

quests.title: Realmwalker
quests.subtitle: You have stamps from places that should not exist.
quests.description:
Stock Resonarium, Lumiere, and Aethersent together. Check when the passport is full.
You have stamps from places that should not exist.
Resonarium, Lumiere, Aethersent — check when the passport is full.

chapters.title: Dungeon Delver's League
chapters.subtitle: Structures — loot is the only passport

quests.title: Crypt Initiation
quests.subtitle: The stones remember every fool.
quests.description:
YUNG's halls, buried shafts, and worse await.
Craft an Explorer's Compass. Point it at something that wants you dead.

quests.title: Lootr Ethics
quests.subtitle: Party loot. Not grief.
quests.description:
Obtain a Lootr Trophy — treasure shared by timeline, not by theft.
Party loot. Not grief.
Treasure shared by timeline — the League stamps ethical thieves.

quests.title: Rising Stones
quests.subtitle: Rise. Loot. Try not to become architecture.
quests.description:
Raid a major dungeon structure and bring a Golden Apple from its chests.
Structure loot is the only accepted alibi.

quests.title: Village of Many Doors
quests.subtitle: Too many doors. Too many stories.
quests.description:
Visit transformed towns and towers. Bring 8 Emeralds as proof they noticed you.
Too many doors. Too many stories.
Eight emeralds prove the towns noticed you — or tried to sell you something.

quests.title: Fortress Receipt
quests.subtitle: The Nether keeps ledgers in blaze.
quests.description:
Clear fortress pressure and return with a Blaze Rod. Hot proof.
The Nether keeps ledgers in blaze.
Hot proof only. Cool stories do not count.

quests.title: Monument Spoils
quests.subtitle: Ocean monuments bill in prismarine.
quests.description:
Loot a monument or ocean structure. Bring Prismarine Shards as the invoice.
Ocean monuments bill in prismarine.
Bring the invoice home. Dry off later.

quests.title: Stronghold Rumor
quests.subtitle: Eyes for the end of the map.
quests.description:
Prepare for the End path. Craft Eyes of Ender — cartography of last doors.
Eyes for the end of the map.
Cartography of last doors — craft the Eyes before hubris crafts you.

quests.title: Lost City Rumors
quests.subtitle: Skyline written in silence.
quests.description:
Ancient Cities are endgame tourism with teeth.
Return with an Echo Shard — the lost city's calling card.

quests.title: Delver Emeritus
quests.subtitle: The League stamps your dossier.
quests.description:
Survive a full structure run and bank the loot at home. Check when the compass cools.
The League stamps your dossier.
Survive a full structure run. Bank the loot. Let the compass cool.

chapters.title: Gunsmith's Ballad
chapters.subtitle: Just Enough Guns (jegn 1.7) — guns, ammo, magazines, attachments

quests.title: Gunsmith Manual
quests.subtitle: Read before you reload.
quests.description:
Obtain the Gunsmith Manual — jegn 1.7 dropped the old scrap workbench ladder.
This book is your table of contents for firearms that still exist in this build.
Open JEI. Search jeg. Believe the recipes, not the wiki fossils.

quests.title: Crowbar Diplomacy
quests.subtitle: Guns jam. Crowbars don't negotiate.
quests.description:
Craft a Crowbar. Field repairs and stubborn crates prefer iron manners.
Keep one in the kit — the Ballad respects tools that don't need magazines.
If it is stuck, crowbar it. If it is jammed, crowbar nearby furniture for morale.

quests.title: Pipe Dream
quests.subtitle: Humble thunder for humble heroes.
quests.description:
Craft a Waterpipe Shotgun — the honest starter boomstick.
Ugly, loud, and registered. Unlike the ghosts of scrap ore.
This is the Ballad's first verse — check JEI for the iron-and-string hymn.

quests.title: Cylinder Gospel
quests.subtitle: Six chambers of negotiation.
quests.description:
Craft a Revolver. Close-range manners for iron-age gunfighters.
Pair it with Pistol Ammo before you practice on creepers.
Keep it oiled. Jams are comedy until they happen mid-raid.

quests.title: Pistol Tithe
quests.subtitle: Copper, iron, gunpowder — democracy.
quests.description:
Craft 32 Pistol Ammo.
Pistols, revolvers, and several SMGs drink from this well.
Stockpile before the fight — mid-combat crafting is a skill issue.

quests.title: Handmade Shells
quests.subtitle: Shotguns prefer homemade hospitality.
quests.description:
Craft Handmade Shells for early shotguns.
When the recipe book says shell, believe it.
Doorways and creepers both respect homemade hospitality.

quests.title: Combat Sidearm
quests.subtitle: The pistol grows up.
quests.description:
Craft a Combat Pistol.
Faster arguments than the revolver — still drinks pistol ammo.
Holster pride; carry magazines.

quests.title: Magazine Manners
quests.subtitle: Loose rounds are for amateurs.
quests.description:
Craft a Pistol Magazine.
Reload like a professional. Jam less. Brag more.
The Guild stamps dossiers for gunsmiths who stop dumping loose bullets on the floor.

quests.title: SMG Sermon
quests.subtitle: Spray with intent.
quests.description:
Craft a Custom SMG and an SMG Magazine.
Volume of fire is a love language — bring earplugs for the party.
Spray with intent. Ammo without a magazine is just optimistic gravel.

quests.title: Pump Doctrine
quests.subtitle: Rack. Boom. Repeat.
quests.description:
Craft a Pump Shotgun and Shotgun Shells.
Doorways fear this verse of the Ballad.
Rack. Boom. Repeat. Polite knock-knocks are for people without shells.

quests.title: Rifle Doctrine
quests.subtitle: Distance is a personality trait.
quests.description:
Craft a Semi Auto Rifle and Rifle Ammo.
The horizon is now a valid conversation partner.

quests.title: Stock Options
quests.subtitle: Shoulder the argument.
quests.description:
Craft a Makeshift Stock and attach it where JEI permits.
Recoil is optional if you pack furniture onto the gun.
Shoulder the argument — literally.

quests.title: Sight Picture
quests.subtitle: Aim is not a rumor.
quests.description:
Craft a Reflex Sight.
Put glass between you and bad decisions.
Hip-firing is a lifestyle; aiming is a career.

quests.title: Grip Gospel
quests.subtitle: Control the muzzle or it controls you.
quests.description:
Craft a Light Grip.
Attachments are how amateurs become annoyingly accurate.
Control the muzzle or it writes your memoir in the dirt.

quests.title: Repair Creed
quests.subtitle: Durability is a fuse. Mending is faith.
quests.description:
Craft a Gun Repair Kit.
Jams love low durability — keep the kit closer than your pride.
Enchantments help; repair kits are honest.

quests.title: Flare Writ
quests.subtitle: Signal the sky. Or the raid.
quests.description:
Craft a Flare Gun and a Flare.
Useful for visibility, drama, and telling allies where the screaming is.

quests.title: Plate Carrier
quests.subtitle: Fashion that stops lead.
quests.description:
Craft Bulletproof Vest I.
The Ballad prefers living narrators. Armor helps.
Fashion that stops lead — upgrade tiers later when the raids get opinions.

quests.title: Assault Writ
quests.subtitle: When semi-auto feels polite.
quests.description:
Craft an Assault Rifle.
Mid-to-late thunder for parties who brought magazines and a plan.
When semi-auto feels polite, this is the louder paragraph.

quests.title: Spectre Armory
quests.subtitle: Pretty name. Unpretty muzzle flash.
quests.description:
Craft the Blossom Rifle — a high-end spectre firearm still registered in jegn.
If JEI asks for strange reagents, follow JEI. Wiki fossils lie.
Pretty name. Unpretty muzzle flash. Bring magazines anyway.

quests.title: Holy Boom
quests.subtitle: Blessed pellets for unholy hours.
quests.description:
Craft the Holy Shotgun.
Pair with the Blossom path — two hymns, one gunsmith.
Blessed pellets for unholy hours. Amen, and reload.

quests.title: Gunsmith Emeritus
quests.subtitle: The ballad ends with a reload.
quests.description:
Keep a Repair Kit and your Gunsmith Manual in the kit.
Check when you can arm, armor, attach, and repair without asking the Guide twice.

chapters.title: Catalog of the Rotten
chapters.subtitle: Rotten Creatures — freeze, fire, pirates, storms

quests.title: Winter's Bite
quests.subtitle: Cold biomes keep uglier neighbors.
quests.description:
Hunt Frostbittens (or convert zombies in powder snow) for Frozen Rotten Flesh.
Do not eat it for fun — eighty percent chance you become the punchline.
This flesh is the gateway to Corrupted Wart and Freeze potions.

quests.title: Corrupted Harvest
quests.subtitle: Nether Wart with worse manners.
quests.description:
Craft Corrupted Wart — four Nether Wart and one Frozen Rotten Flesh.
Brew it into a plain Water Bottle (not Awkward) for Corrupted Potion.

quests.title: Freeze Writ
quests.subtitle: Immobilize. Then negotiate.
quests.description:
Brew a Splash Potion of Freeze (Frozen Rotten Flesh into Corrupted Potion).
Targets lose the right to jump. Milk is the only apology that works.

quests.title: Magma Tithe
quests.subtitle: The Nether's answer to winter.
quests.description:
Hunt Burneds in Nether Wastes for Magma Rotten Flesh.
Do not splash them with water unless you want the Obsidian form.
Frostbitten and Burned hate each other — exploit the feud.

quests.title: Hunter's Spear
quests.subtitle: Arctic etiquette, pointed.
quests.description:
Face a Glacial Hunter and claim its Spear.
Snow biomes. Optional wolf. Optional regret.

quests.title: Cave Ledger
quests.subtitle: Miners who forgot to stay dead.
quests.description:
Obtain an Undead Miner Head from cave encounters below Y=63.
Ranks carry stone, iron, diamond, or gold pickaxes — Badlands prefer gold.

quests.title: Swamp Compact
quests.subtitle: Leap, blind, poison — in that order.
quests.description:
Claim a Swampy Head from swamp biomes.
Do not stand over dying Swampies. Lingering poison is not a spa day.

quests.title: Desert Compact
quests.subtitle: Hunger III is a love letter.
quests.description:
Claim a Mummy Head from desert biomes.
Scarabs arrive as a party favor. Step back before the beetles RSVP.

quests.title: Dead Beard's Writ
quests.subtitle: Beach mini-boss. Pirate math.
quests.description:
Defeat Dead Beard and claim the Treasure Chest before the TNT Barrel erases the loot.
Place the chest on the ground to open it — inventory stubbornness will not work.
Crew lackeys are temporary. The explosion is permanent.

quests.title: Immortal Storm
quests.subtitle: Thunder is the invitation.
quests.description:
Kill an Immortal during a thunderstorm and claim its head as proof.
Storms guarantee Trident drops; calm weather is for cowards and unlucky calendars.
If the storm ends mid-fight, the Immortal becomes embarrassingly mortal.

quests.title: Rotten Emeritus
quests.subtitle: The Catalog is complete.
quests.description:
Stock Frozen Rotten Flesh, Magma Rotten Flesh, and a Splash Potion of Freeze.
Check when every biome's undead has a footnote in your dossier.

chapters.title: Forge of Silent Legends
chapters.subtitle: Silent Gear 4 — blueprints, tips, crimson, azure, starlight

quests.title: Material Codex
quests.subtitle: Names before myths.
quests.description:
Obtain a Material Book — the in-game ledger of every loaded material.
Wiki advice: JEI is mandatory. Guessing recipes is a speedrun into tears.

quests.title: Stone Anvil
quests.subtitle: Logs fear knives.
quests.description:
Craft a Stone Anvil. Place logs. Strike with a knife.
Template boards are born here — the temporary twin of blueprints.

quests.title: Crude Knife
quests.subtitle: Ugly, cheap, essential.
quests.description:
Craft Crude Tool Parts, then a Crude Knife.
Other knives tagged c:tools/knife may work — the Guild prefers the crude classic.

quests.title: Template Boards
quests.subtitle: Single-use destiny.
quests.description:
Use the knife on logs at the Stone Anvil to obtain Template Boards.
Templates craft like blueprints but vanish after one use.

quests.title: Blueprint Paper
quests.subtitle: Permanent ink for permanent gear.
quests.description:
Craft Blueprint Paper (paper + blue dye).
Wiki tip: switch to blueprints the moment you can — templates waste resources.

quests.title: Pickaxe Writ
quests.subtitle: Your best friend, rewritten.
quests.description:
Craft a Pickaxe Blueprint.
Three main materials for the head. Shapeless. JEI's Gear Crafting tab knows.

quests.title: Rod Doctrine
quests.subtitle: Sticks are for rookies.
quests.description:
Craft a Rod Blueprint. Two iron ingots → four iron rods.
Swap rods on existing tools in the crafting grid — upgrades without a funeral.

quests.title: First Silent Pick
quests.subtitle: Vanilla conversion is optional. Crafting is cleaner.
quests.description:
Craft any Silent Gear Pickaxe (head + rod).
Iron head + wood rod matches vanilla iron — iron rods improve the sermon.

quests.title: Tip of Progress
quests.subtitle: One diamond. Diamond harvest tier.
quests.description:
Craft a Tip Upgrade Blueprint, then apply a diamond tip to an iron pickaxe.
Wiki path: tip upgrades beat remaking whole tools when diamonds are scarce.
Obsidian mining unlocks next.

quests.title: Repair Creed
quests.subtitle: Breakage is a suggestion.
quests.description:
Craft a Crude Repair Kit. Fill it with materials; craft with gear to mend.
Very Crude kits exist before iron — pride is optional, durability is not.

quests.title: Blueprint Library
quests.subtitle: Z and C are your new religions.
quests.description:
Craft a Blueprint Book. Store blueprints; cycle with Z/C (default).
The book stands in for the selected blueprint in recipes — inventory breathes again.

quests.title: Crimson Iron
quests.subtitle: Nether ore with ambitions.
quests.description:
Mine Crimson Iron Ore and smelt Crimson Iron Ingots.
Iron-tier harvest. Found throughout netherrack — bring fire resistance manners.

quests.title: Crimson Steel
quests.subtitle: Stronger than diamond. Hotter temper.
quests.description:
Craft Crimson Steel (crimson iron + blaze rods + magma cream).
Unlocks the Alloy Forge. Flame Ward armor set = full fire immunity.
Netherite-tier harvest for The End's stubborn ores.

quests.title: Alloy Forge
quests.subtitle: Mix metals like a civilized heretic.
quests.description:
Craft the Alloy Forge — cheaper alloy recipes than the crafting grid.
Compound materials begin here in earnest.

quests.title: Blaze Gold
quests.subtitle: Pretty stats. Fragile ego.
quests.description:
Craft Blaze Gold Ingots.
Excellent rods and bonuses; unlocks the Material Grader.
Durability is only twice gold — use it wisely.

quests.title: Material Grader
quests.subtitle: Parts get report cards.
quests.description:
Craft the Material Grader (unlocked by Blaze Gold).
Grades improve material quality — mediocre ore becomes intentional myth.

quests.title: Azure Silver
quests.subtitle: The End's soft moonlight metal.
quests.description:
Mine Azure Silver Ore (netherite-tier harvest) and smelt Azure Silver Ingots.
Crimson steel or netherite coating gets you there. Moon Walker awaits.

quests.title: Azure Electrum
quests.subtitle: Insane speed. Accelerate as it wears.
quests.description:
Craft Azure Electrum (azure silver + ender pearls + gold).
Unlocks the Recrystallizer. Mining speed that laughs at geology.

quests.title: Recrystallizer
quests.subtitle: Remake materials into better opinions.
quests.description:
Craft the Recrystallizer.
Late-game material alchemy for parties who refuse mediocre grades.

quests.title: Starlight Ambition
quests.subtitle: Charge the myth until the stats blush.
quests.description:
Craft a Starlight Charger.
Big stat bonuses to materials — the Silent Forge's late hymn.

quests.title: Silent Emeritus
quests.subtitle: Your gear has a birth certificate.
quests.description:
Wear Silent Gear you forged yourself into a real fight.
Check when mass-produced steel feels like NPC cosplay.

chapters.title: Hymn of Eternal Starlight
chapters.subtitle: Eternal Starlight — Gatekeeper → biomes → Golem & Monstrosity → Unrealium

quests.title: Challenge the Gatekeeper
quests.subtitle: Portal Ruins. He attacks on sight.
quests.description:
Find Overworld Portal Ruins — Common, Cold, Desert, Forest, or Jungle variants.
The Gatekeeper has ~175 HP. Meteors, dash-stabs, ground slams. Mid-range + shield.
You need not kill him — force submission. Open the Loot Bag for the Orb of Prophecy.
Iron/Diamond gear minimum. Bring food, blocks, and patience for falling rocks.

quests.title: Glimmering Tablet
quests.subtitle: Read before you step through.
quests.description:
Claim the Glimmering Tablet (Starlight Story book) from the Gatekeeper's bag.
It sketches biomes, boss tracking, and why Lunar Berries matter later.
Also pocket Seeking Eyes and the Keeper Armor Trim if the bag is generous.

quests.title: Clear the Frame
quests.subtitle: Torreya Vines block ignition.
quests.description:
Break every Torreya Vine on the portal frame before activation.
Vines left behind silently fail the ritual — clear first, then ignite.
Keep a stack; vines also appear around Torreya wood in the dimension.

quests.title: Starlight Crossing
quests.subtitle: A sky that isn't ours.
quests.description:
Main-hand the Orb of Prophecy. Right-click the top dark portal blocks.
Enter eternal_starlight:starlight. Bring Lunar Berries home as passport proof.
Stock food, fire resistance manners, and a pickaxe before you commit.
Disable heavy shaders briefly if you cannot see the activation particles.

quests.title: Seeking Eye
quests.subtitle: Ender Eyes for a foreign sky.
quests.description:
Craft Seeking Eyes from Starlight Flowers that grow across the dimension.
Throw while holding the correct off-hand bait:
  • Redstone → Starlight Golem / Golem Forge
  • Lunar Berries → Lunar Monstrosity / Cursed Garden
Follow where the eye lands, then dig. Structure rings of Voidstone mark forges above ground.

quests.title: Way Home in Voidstone
quests.subtitle: The portal does not follow you.
quests.description:
Mine Voidstone underground. Craft Chiseled Voidstone and rebuild the frame exactly.
Ignite the return portal with the Orb of Prophecy — it is not consumed.
Do this before deep boss runs. Getting stranded is a lore choice, not a strategy.

quests.title: Deepsilver Tithe
quests.subtitle: Faster than diamond. Swamp mud remembers.
quests.description:
Mine Deepsilver Ore in Grimstone, Voidstone, ice layers, and Nightfall Mud — Dark Swamp helps.
Smelt Deepsilver Ingots. Tools mine fast (~12); armor grants speed and knockback resistance.
This metal is also an Unrealium alloy ingredient. Stockpile early.

quests.title: Thermal Springstone
quests.subtitle: Fire manners for a fire-immune boss later.
quests.description:
Gather Thermal Springstone (lakes / forge loot / ore) and smelt Thermal Springstone Ingots.
Armor reduces fire damage and scorches nearby mobs — excellent Lunar Monstrosity prep.
Hammer hits hard and slow. Starfire Upgrade Templates (Golem loot) push this tier further.

quests.title: Glacite Harvest
quests.subtitle: Permafrost caves keep giant crystals.
quests.description:
Descend beneath the Starlight Permafrost Forest. Mine Glacite crystal formations.
One crystal yields many Glacite Shards. Armor and weapons freeze attackers.
Mandatory manners for Freeze mobs guarding the Golem Forge — leather boots help too.

quests.title: Malarite Vein
quests.subtitle: Poison arrows and alloy fuel.
quests.description:
Mine Malarite from Grimstone, Voidstone, and Nightfall Mud cave layers.
Fast melee weapons; Malarite Arrows inflict Poison. No armor tier — offense only.
Required for Unrealium in the Alloy Furnace. Do not skip the stockpile.

quests.title: Starlit Diamond
quests.subtitle: Toughness that outranks vanity.
quests.description:
Mine Starlit Diamond Ore in Grimstone, Voidstone, Eternal Ice, or Haze Ice caves.
Smelt Starlit Diamonds — ~2500 durability, high toughness armor (20 / 3.0).
Best pre-alloy armor set. Wear it into the Cursed Garden without shame.

quests.title: Glacite Shield
quests.subtitle: Freeze the things that freeze you.
quests.description:
Craft a Glacite Shield from your shard harvest.
It can freeze attacking mobs solid — strongest shield in the mod.
Bring it to the Golem Forge. Freeze projectiles kill prideful pilgrims.

quests.title: Tooth of Hunger
quests.subtitle: Crystallized Desert collects debts.
quests.description:
Hunt Thirst Walkers in the Crystallized Desert for a Tooth of Hunger.
Red/Blue Starlight Crystal clusters here also feed Mana Crystal crafting.
Twilight Sand builds pretty tombs. The Tooth builds something hungrier.

quests.title: Dagger of Hunger
quests.subtitle: Feed it kills — or it feeds on you.
quests.description:
Craft the Dagger of Hunger from the Tooth.
It must be fed with kills. Neglect its appetite and it drains your health.
Living weapons keep their own ledgers. Stay current.

quests.title: Thioquartz Vigil
quests.subtitle: Ether River is not a swimming hole.
quests.description:
Harvest Thioquartz Shards near Ether fluid biomes.
Ether deals continuous damage. Do not dive for souvenirs without protection.
Alchemist gear from Thioquartz grants Ether Resistance for Flowglaze work.

quests.title: Alchemist Mask
quests.subtitle: Breathe where the river bites.
quests.description:
Craft an Alchemist Mask (Thioquartz set) before serious Ether work.
Ether Resistance turns a death biome into a quarry.
Finish the robe set if you plan long Flowglaze harvests.

quests.title: Flowglaze Prize
quests.subtitle: Where Ether kisses water.
quests.description:
Collect Flowglaze that forms where Ether fluid contacts water.
Wear Alchemist protection. Pocket the quartz-like blocks for Flowglaze tools/scythes.
Optional late vanity: Flowglaze Scythe looks like it belongs in a hymn.

quests.title: Golem Steel Hymn
quests.subtitle: Disable generators. Dodge the beam. Smelt the rust.
quests.description:
Track the Golem Forge: Seeking Eye + Redstone off-hand. Surface Voidstone rings mark it.
Right-click Energy Generators to drop the Starlight Golem's shield, then burst damage.
When arms rise — RUN. The light beam ignores armor. Freezes in the forge hate the unprepared.
Loot Bag drops Oxidized Golem Steel — smelt into Golem Steel Ingots. Bring one home.

quests.title: Chain of Souls
quests.subtitle: Set it on fire — or deal zero forever.
quests.description:
Track the Cursed Garden: Seeking Eye + Lunar Berries off-hand. Huge underground maze.
Lunar Monstrosity is immune until ignited (Fire Aspect, flaming arrows, fire charges).
Kill/control the Tangled Hatred tentacle. Retreat into maze corridors to heal.
Loot Bag proof: Chain of Souls — 64-block whip that drinks souls. Claim it.

quests.title: Crescent Spear
quests.subtitle: Riptide without the thunderstorm tax.
quests.description:
Obtain the Crescent Spear — Lunar Monstrosity progression prize / craft path after the garden.
Permanent Riptide in any weather. Mobility turns the starlight map into a commute.
Pair with Chain of Souls for pull-and-punish manners.

quests.title: Soul Dew
quests.subtitle: Garden dew for endgame alloy.
quests.description:
Collect Soul Dew from Lunar Monstrosity loot / Cursed Garden spoils.
Required Unrealium ingredient alongside Deepsilver, Golem Steel, and Malarite.
Nightfall Spider Eyes + Soul Dew also craft the Soulit Spectator scouting tool.

quests.title: Aethersent Ingot
quests.subtitle: Meteor showers mint foreign iron.
quests.description:
Obtain Aethersent Ingots — Creteor kills during meteor showers (or related sky events).
Aethersent armor answers damage with falling meteors. Highest enchantability in the mod.
Starfall Longbow recipes use Creteor Hide. Keep scraps.

quests.title: Aetherstrike Rocket
quests.subtitle: Schedule the sky's temper tantrum.
quests.description:
Craft or claim an Aetherstrike Rocket to trigger a meteor shower on demand.
Farm Creteors and Aethersent without waiting on celestial calendars.
Warn the party before launch. Falling stars do not check friend lists.

quests.title: Alloy Furnace
quests.subtitle: Mix the hymn's metals — watch the heat.
quests.description:
Craft the Alloy Furnace. Synthesize Unrealium from Deepsilver + Golem Steel + Malarite + Soul Dew.
Do not leave it running past ~10 minutes — overheat explodes (~3 block radius).
Wax with Raw Amaramber or Honeycomb for a decorative Waxed Alloy Furnace if desired.

quests.title: Unrealium Crown
quests.subtitle: Fastest tools. End of the metal hymn.
quests.description:
Alloy an Unrealium Ingot. Mining speed 15 — top craftable tier in Eternal Starlight.
Armor ties Starlit Diamond at 20 points. Crossbow and full set are late flexes.
Wear Unrealium into any remaining structure and rewrite the ledger.

quests.title: Mana Crystal Chorus
quests.subtitle: Orb of Prophecy doubles as a wand.
quests.description:
Craft a Mana Crystal from the six elemental crystals (Terra/Wind/Water/Lunar/Blaze/Light).
Red Starlight Crystal Shards from the Crystallized Desert are the common feedstock.
Hold the Orb, cycle crests (default I), cast with charged Mana Crystal in inventory.
Blazing Beam (Golem crest path) is the signature laser — run the same manners you feared.

quests.title: Starlight Emeritus
quests.subtitle: The hymn ends when you can leave — and return.
quests.description:
You opened ruins, stamped Lunar Berries, armed with Deepsilver/Glacite/Thermal,
silenced the Golem Forge, burned the Lunar Monstrosity, and forged Unrealium.
Check when Orb, Seeking Eyes, return Voidstone portal, and Unrealium gear are routine.
Depths & Realms still stamps the passport — this chapter taught you the country.

groups.title: Spellwright Codex
groups.blurb: Magic treated like any other industry: studied, then automated.

chapters.title: First Cantrips
chapters.subtitle: Iron's Spellbooks — loot, inscribe, forge, ascend

quests.title: Whispers in the Loot
quests.subtitle: Scrolls hide in the bones of the world.
quests.description:
Magic begins as scavenged ink. Obtain any spell scroll.
Magical structures are the best teachers — and the rudest.

quests.title: The Inscription Rite
quests.subtitle: Where contracts become slots.
quests.description:
Craft the Inscription Table — your first true wizard station.
Bring scrolls here to bind them into a spellbook.

quests.title: Wimpy Beginnings
quests.subtitle: Five slots. Infinite ambition.
quests.description:
Craft a Wimpy Spell Book — the flimsy starter tome. Every archmage started embarrassed.
Five slots. Infinite ambition.
Every archmage started embarrassed — wear the Wimpy tome with pride.

quests.title: Copper Focus
quests.subtitle: Better binding. Still humble.
quests.description:
Craft a Copper Spell Book when scrap-paper destiny no longer fits.
Better binding. Still humble.
Scrap-paper destiny no longer fits — copper listens better.

quests.title: Ironbound Will
quests.subtitle: Six slots. Uncommon spells welcome.
quests.description:
Craft an Iron Spell Book — the real apprenticeship. Inscribe something that hurts.
Six slots. Uncommon spells welcome.
The real apprenticeship — inscribe something that hurts.

quests.title: Field Exam
quests.subtitle: Theory is cute. Corpses are honest.
quests.description:
Vanquish the restless until your satchel reeks of proof. Bring 16 Rotten Flesh.
Theory is cute. Corpses are honest.
Sixteen Rotten Flesh — field exams do not accept essays.

quests.title: Wayward Seeking
quests.subtitle: Magic structures call to the compass.
quests.description:
Craft a Wayward Compass and hunt magical ruins for scrolls and essence.
Magic structures call to the compass.
Hunt ruins for scrolls and essence. The Wayward never naps.

quests.title: Gold-Bound Ward
quests.subtitle: Naked casters are cautionary tales.
quests.description:
Craft a Gold Spell Book — cast-time reduction and mana for those who mean it.
Naked casters are cautionary tales.
Cast-time reduction and mana for those who mean it — gold-bound.

quests.title: Descent for Power
quests.subtitle: Nether reagents unlock the Scroll Forge.
quests.description:
The Nether does not stamp passports — it drops Blaze Rods. Bring one home.
Nether reagents unlock the Scroll Forge.
No passport stamp — just a Blaze Rod and the smell of resolve.

quests.title: Scroll Forge
quests.subtitle: Ink decides rarity. Focus decides school.
quests.description:
Craft a Scroll Forge. Paper + ink + focus = manufactured destiny.
Ink decides rarity. Focus decides school.
Paper + ink + focus = manufactured destiny. Forge accordingly.

quests.title: Essence Tithe
quests.subtitle: Arcane Essence is the realm's honest currency.
quests.description:
Gather Arcane Essence from magical structures and foes. Bring sixteen as tribute.
Arcane Essence is the realm's honest currency.
Sixteen as tribute — structures and foes both pay.

quests.title: Blood Ledger
quests.subtitle: Some schools prefer crimson ink.
quests.description:
Obtain Blood Vials from Dead King vaults or bloody work. Keep them cold.
Some schools prefer crimson ink.
Blood Vials from vaults or bloody work — keep them cold.

quests.title: Diamond Doctrine
quests.subtitle: Ten slots. Serious mana.
quests.description:
Craft a Diamond Spell Book when gold feels small.
Ten slots. Serious mana.
When gold feels small, diamond doctrine begins.

quests.title: Arcane Anvil
quests.subtitle: Upgrade scrolls, armor, books; imbue weapons.
quests.description:
Craft the Arcane Anvil — late-game station of unlimited power.
Upgrade scrolls, armor, books; imbue weapons.
Late-game station of unlimited power — treat the anvil like a temple.

quests.title: Netherite Grimoire
quests.subtitle: Cooldown reduction. Two hundred mana.
quests.description:
Craft a Netherite Spell Book. Endgame slots for endgame scars.
Cooldown reduction. Two hundred mana.
Endgame slots for endgame scars — netherite grimoire.

quests.title: Dead King's Lullaby
quests.subtitle: Bring the Bone Key — or it did not count.
quests.description:
Defeat The Dead King and claim his Bone Key. Inventory proof only.
Bring the Bone Key — or it did not count.
The Dead King's lullaby ends in inventory proof only.

quests.title: Magehunter Emeritus
quests.subtitle: A job title, not a compliment.
quests.description:
Obtain Magehunter — proof other casters should fear your footnote.
A job title, not a compliment.
Other casters should fear your footnote — Magehunter earned.

chapters.title: Apotheosis Ascension
chapters.subtitle: Affixes, gems, reforging — loot as destiny

quests.title: Affix Awakening
quests.subtitle: Loot grows opinions.
quests.description:
Obtain any Apotheosis Gem. The first whisper that gear can become myth.
Loot grows opinions.
The first whisper that gear can become myth — hold the gem carefully.

quests.title: Gemcutter's Bench
quests.subtitle: Precision is a kind of prayer.
quests.description:
Craft a Gem Cutting Table. Raw sparkle becomes intentional sparkle.
Precision is a kind of prayer.
Raw sparkle becomes intentional sparkle on the cutting table.

quests.title: Sigil of Socketing
quests.subtitle: Permission to rewrite gear into myth.
quests.description:
Obtain a Sigil of Socketing. Holes in armor are features.
Permission to rewrite gear into myth.
Holes in armor are features — socket wisely.

quests.title: Simple Reforge
quests.subtitle: Draft one. Iterate.
quests.description:
Craft a Simple Reforging Table. First drafts of destiny.
Draft one. Iterate.
First drafts of destiny — simple reforging is rehearsal.

quests.title: True Reforging
quests.subtitle: When simple is not enough.
quests.description:
Craft a Reforging Table for serious affix work.
When simple is not enough.
Serious affix work demands the true table — and patience.

quests.title: Salvager's Mercy
quests.subtitle: Failure has scrap value.
quests.description:
Craft a Salvaging Table. Bad rolls become tomorrow's materials.
Failure has scrap value.
Bad rolls become tomorrow's materials — mercy with a blade.

quests.title: Sigil Library
quests.subtitle: Tools of metamorphosis.
quests.description:
Obtain Sigils of Enhancement and Rebirth. Keep them labeled.
Tools of metamorphosis.
Enhancement and Rebirth — keep them labeled, keep them ready.

quests.title: Mythic Ambition
quests.subtitle: Wear something the loot tables fear.
quests.description:
Socket a gem into gear and reforge until you smile. Check when vanity becomes DPS.
Wear something the loot tables fear.
Socket, reforge, smile. Check when vanity becomes DPS.

chapters.title: Industrial Thaumaturgy
chapters.subtitle: Enchantment Industry — automate the sacred

quests.title: Experience Hatch
quests.subtitle: XP is a fluid if you are brave enough.
quests.description:
Craft an Experience Hatch. Pipe the levels like oil.
XP is a fluid if you are brave enough.
Pipe the levels like oil — the Hatch is the spout.

quests.title: Lantern of Levels
quests.subtitle: Visible power. Portable regret.
quests.description:
Craft an Experience Lantern. Store genius in a jar.
Visible power. Portable regret.
Store genius in a jar. Try not to drink it by accident.

quests.title: Blaze Enchanter
quests.subtitle: Why sit at a table when fire works overtime?
quests.description:
Craft a Blaze Enchanter. Automate what librarians gatekeep.
Why sit at a table when fire works overtime?
Automate what librarians gatekeep — blaze does not unionize.

quests.title: Blaze Forger
quests.subtitle: Enchantments that stick like industrial glue.
quests.description:
Craft a Blaze Forger. Apply power without the prayer circle.
Enchantments that stick like industrial glue.
Apply power without the prayer circle — the Forger prefers RPM.

quests.title: Printer's Devil
quests.subtitle: Copy the sacred. Sell the copies.
quests.description:
Craft a Printer. Enchantment Industry's favorite heresy.
Copy the sacred. Sell the copies.
Enchantment Industry's favorite heresy — the Printer grins.

quests.title: Mechanical Grindstone
quests.subtitle: Disenchantment with style.
quests.description:
Craft a Mechanical Grindstone. Strip power. Recycle hubris.
Disenchantment with style.
Strip power. Recycle hubris. The grindstone keeps receipts.

quests.title: Super Experience
quests.subtitle: When normal XP feels provincial.
quests.description:
Obtain a Super Experience Nugget. Dense genius.
When normal XP feels provincial.
Dense genius — Super Experience Nugget as concentrated ambition.

quests.title: Thaumic Factory
quests.subtitle: A line that enchants while you sleep.
quests.description:
Hook hatch, enchanter, and forger into one Create line. Check when it runs unattended.
A line that enchants while you sleep.
Hook hatch, enchanter, and forger. Check when it runs unattended.

groups.title: Beyond the Cradle
groups.blurb: The endgame arc, where machinery finally leaves the planet.

chapters.title: Metallurgy of the Void
chapters.subtitle: Wiki path: steel → oxygen chain → oil → fuel

quests.title: Steel Horizon
quests.subtitle: Iron dreams of leaving the cradle.
quests.description:
Smelt 16 Stellaris Steel Ingots.
Per the Stellaris wiki, steel is the skeleton of every machine that follows.

quests.title: Heavy Metal
quests.subtitle: Stubborn bones for stubborn void.
quests.description:
Obtain 8 Heavy Metal Ingots. Rockets and habitats refuse soft metal.
Stubborn bones for stubborn void.
Rockets and habitats refuse soft metal — heavy only.

quests.title: Breath of Worlds
quests.subtitle: Water first. Air second.
quests.description:
Craft a Water Pump and place it over a water source.
Wiki: pumps and separators both need power.

quests.title: Separation Rite
quests.subtitle: Split H2O into breathable law.
quests.description:
Craft a Water Separator. Left tank: hydrogen. Right tank: oxygen.
Fill Oxygen Tanks or Space Suits from the oxygen output.

quests.title: Coal for the Cold Dark
quests.subtitle: Ugly power. Sacred purpose.
quests.description:
Craft a Coal Generator. Keep the pump and separator humming.
Ugly power. Sacred purpose.
Keep the pump and separator humming — coal is unglamorous oxygen.

quests.title: Portable Lungs
quests.subtitle: Never launch empty.
quests.description:
Craft an Oxygen Tank and fill it from the separator.
Never launch empty — vacuum does not negotiate, and heroics without air are comedy.
Suit first. Heroics later. The Guide prefers living narrators.

quests.title: Engine Fan
quests.subtitle: Air needs a push.
quests.description:
Craft an Engine Fan — required later for Oxygen Distributors.
Air needs a push.
Required later for Oxygen Distributors — colonies breathe on fans.

quests.title: Big Oxygen Reserve
quests.subtitle: Colonies drink deeper tanks.
quests.description:
Craft a Big Oxygen Tank. Sealed rooms are hungrier than suits.
Sealed rooms are hungrier than suits.
Big tanks for habitats that intend to stay awake.

quests.title: Oil Finder
quests.subtitle: Rockets drink crude, not coal.
quests.description:
Craft an Oil Finder. Survey Earth for black courage.
Rockets drink crude, not coal.
Survey Earth for black courage — the Oil Finder points rudely.

quests.title: Pumpjack
quests.subtitle: Be rude to geology.
quests.description:
Craft a Pumpjack and extract Oil.
Be rude to geology.
Extract Oil. Destiny has a viscosity.

quests.title: Refinery Hymn
quests.subtitle: Crude becomes courage.
quests.description:
Craft a Fuel Refinery. Chemistry as a launch checklist.
Crude becomes courage.
Chemistry as a launch checklist — refine or remain grounded.

quests.title: Fuel in Hand
quests.subtitle: Bucket the dream.
quests.description:
Obtain a Fuel Bucket. Hold liftoff in inventory.
Bucket the dream.
Hold liftoff in inventory — Fuel Bucket is the honest countdown.

chapters.title: Launch Codex
chapters.subtitle: Wiki: Rocket Station → pads → fuel → space

quests.title: Rocket Station Writ
quests.subtitle: An other kind of workbench.
quests.description:
Craft a Rocket Station. All rocket parts are born here.
An other kind of workbench.
All rocket parts are born here — treat the station like an altar.

quests.title: Assemble the Arrow
quests.subtitle: Nose, fins, engine, destiny.
quests.description:
Craft Rocket Nose Cone, Fin, and Engine at the station.
Nose, fins, engine, destiny.
Parts first; poetry later. Assemble the arrow's bones.

quests.title: Nine Stones of Departure
quests.subtitle: 3x3 launch pad. No cleverness.
quests.description:
Craft 9 Rocket Launch Pads and build the pad structure.
Wiki: right-click the pads with the Rocket to place it.

quests.title: Full Suit
quests.subtitle: Fashion for vacuum.
quests.description:
Craft the complete Space Suit. Exposed skin is a comedy bit in space.
Fill the suit with oxygen from your separator before launch.

quests.title: The Arrow Complete
quests.subtitle: One recipe. Infinite upgrades later.
quests.description:
Craft the Rocket. Wiki: there is only one rocket recipe — upgrades change range and fuel.
Wiki truth: one rocket recipe — upgrades change range and fuel.
Craft it. Fear it. Love it. Place it on sacred squares.

quests.title: Tanked for Departure
quests.subtitle: Fill the left tank. Press space.
quests.description:
Obtain Fuel Bucket and Oxygen Tank. Checklist: fuel full, suit sealed, pads clear.
Checklist: fuel full, suit sealed, pads clear.
Martyrs skip checklists. Professionals fill tanks.

quests.title: Model Upgrade
quests.subtitle: Farther worlds demand bigger tanks.
quests.description:
Craft a Big Fuel Tank Upgrade. Install it in the rocket's upgrade slots (open inventory while riding).
Farther worlds demand bigger tanks.
Install upgrades in the rocket's slots — open inventory while riding.

quests.title: Liftoff
quests.subtitle: Moon dust is the flight log.
quests.description:
Launch, land on the Moon, and return with Moon Sand.
Throttle down on landing. Bring spare launch pads for the return trip.

quests.title: First Orbit Logged
quests.subtitle: Earth is now optional.
quests.description:
Obtain a Moon Globe. Cartography of first contact.
Earth is now optional.
Moon Globe — cartography of first contact. Hang it where cradle-dwellers can see.

chapters.title: Colonial Charter
chapters.subtitle: Flag → sealed air → rover → Moon/Mars/Venus/Mercury

quests.title: Plant the Banner
quests.subtitle: Colonies begin with a claim, not a speech.
quests.description:
Craft a Flag and plant it on the Moon. Soft power with a steel pole.
Colonies begin with a claim, not a speech.
Plant the Flag on the Moon — soft power with a steel pole.

quests.title: Solar Law
quests.subtitle: The void does not sell electricity.
quests.description:
Craft a Solar Panel. Power the bubble with amethyst and steel.
The void does not sell electricity.
Power the bubble with amethyst and steel — Solar Law.

quests.title: Cable Spine
quests.subtitle: Power needs veins.
quests.description:
Craft Cable. Wire generators to pumps, separators, and distributors.
Power needs veins.
Wire generators to pumps, separators, and distributors — Cable Spine.

quests.title: Pipe Creed
quests.subtitle: Fluids are politics.
quests.description:
Craft Pipe (T1). Move water, oxygen, and fuel without buckets forever.
Fluids are politics.
Move water, oxygen, and fuel without buckets forever — Pipe Creed.

quests.title: Big Lungs
quests.subtitle: Distributor hunger.
quests.description:
Craft a Big Oxygen Tank. Wiki: fill it from the separator, then seat it in the distributor.
Distributor hunger.
Wiki: fill from the separator, then seat the tank in the distributor.

quests.title: Breathable Law
quests.subtitle: Seal the room. Power the distributor. Live.
quests.description:
Craft an Oxygen Distributor.
Wiki: place it in a sealed room with nothing above it, insert a filled oxygen tank, keep it powered.
Oxygen propagates in all directions through the sealed volume.

quests.title: Habitat Online
quests.subtitle: Sleep without a helmet once.
quests.description:
Build a sealed Moon habitat with distributor + solar/cable power.
Check when you can breathe inside without the suit.

quests.title: Rover Writ
quests.subtitle: Walk less. Explore more.
quests.description:
Craft a Rover for planetary surface travel. Zoom across dust without wasting suit air.
Walk less. Explore more.
Zoom across dust without wasting suit air — Rover Writ.

quests.title: Desh Harvest
quests.subtitle: Moon metal for moon ambitions.
quests.description:
Smelt Desh Ingots from lunar ore. Soft Earth metals stay homesick.
Moon metal for moon ambitions.
Soft Earth metals stay homesick — smelt Desh.

quests.title: Cheese Tax
quests.subtitle: The Guide demands one joke.
quests.description:
Obtain Stellaris Cheese. Humor is a colony resource.
The Guide demands one joke.
Humor is a colony resource — pay the Cheese Tax.

quests.title: Lunar Forage
quests.subtitle: Even the Moon grows rumors.
quests.description:
Obtain Moon Berries or Moon Fruit from lunar flora.
Even the Moon grows rumors.
Lunar flora in the satchel — berries or fruit as forage proof.

quests.title: Mars Crossing
quests.subtitle: Red dust. New laws.
quests.description:
Reach Mars and bring Mars Sand home. Red grit is the visa stamp.
Install Big Fuel Tank Upgrade if range complains.

quests.title: Tharsite Claim
quests.subtitle: Mars pays in hard metal.
quests.description:
Obtain Tharsite Ingot from Martian ore.
Mars pays in hard metal.
Tharsite from Martian ore — red dust's stubborn gift.

quests.title: Ice Tithe
quests.subtitle: Cold proof of a living colony.
quests.description:
Obtain Ice Shards from Martian ice veins.
Cold proof of a living colony.
Ice Shards from Martian veins — the tithe of frost.

quests.title: Mars Globe
quests.subtitle: Hang conquest where Earth can see.
quests.description:
Obtain a Mars Globe.
Hang conquest where Earth can see.
Mars Globe — cartography of red ambition.

quests.title: Venus Crossing
quests.subtitle: Heat, acid, and ambition.
quests.description:
Reach Venus and return with Venus Sand. Structures and lava outposts await.
Heat, acid, and ambition.
Venus Sand home — structures and lava outposts await the bold.

quests.title: Corronium Spoils
quests.subtitle: Venus metal with opinions.
quests.description:
Obtain Corronium Ingot from Venus.
Venus metal with opinions.
Corronium spoils — smelt carefully, brag loudly.

quests.title: Mercury Crossing
quests.subtitle: Closest to the fire.
quests.description:
Reach Mercury and bring Mercury Stone. Factories and volcanoes remember you.
Closest to the fire.
Mercury Stone home — factories and volcanoes remember you.

quests.title: Solerium Harvest
quests.subtitle: Sun-touched ore.
quests.description:
Obtain Solerium from Mercury.
Sun-touched ore.
Solerium from Mercury — harvest what the fire allows.

quests.title: Starfarer Emeritus
quests.subtitle: The cradle was only chapter one.
quests.description:
Stock Moon Globe, Mars Globe, and a planetary Flag.
Check when every planet in the charter has felt your boots.

chapters.title: Orbital Dockyards
chapters.subtitle: Antenna → modules → Small/Medium/Big Space Station

quests.title: Antenna Writ
quests.subtitle: Stations are born from a beacon, not a wish.
quests.description:
Craft an Antenna. Place it, then feed it the metal tithe for your chosen station size.
Small Station costs 100 Steel + 100 Heavy Metal. Medium 150/150. Big 200/200.

quests.title: Tier I Base Module
quests.subtitle: The first circuit of habitat logic.
quests.description:
Craft a Tier 1 Base Module (heavy metal nuggets + gold).
The first circuit of habitat logic.
Heavy metal nuggets and gold — Tier I begins the dockyard gospel.

quests.title: Upgrade Station
quests.subtitle: Where suits learn new verbs.
quests.description:
Craft an Upgrade Station. Install modules into space / jet suits here.
Where suits learn new verbs.
Install modules into space and jet suits — Upgrade Station rite.

quests.title: Small Station Tithe
quests.subtitle: 100 Steel. 100 Heavy Metal. No IOUs.
quests.description:
Stockpile 100 Steel Ingots — materials for a Small Space Station.
100 Steel. No IOUs.
Materials for a Small Space Station — the Antenna keeps score.

quests.title: Heavy Tithe
quests.subtitle: Matching stubbornness.
quests.description:
Stockpile 100 Heavy Metal Ingots for the Small Station commission.
Matching stubbornness.
100 Heavy Metal for the Small Station commission — twin tithe.

quests.title: Commission: Small Station
quests.subtitle: Open the orbital address book.
quests.description:
Use the Antenna with the Small Station materials to create a Small Space Station.
Check when you can travel to stellaris:space_station_small.

quests.title: Tier II Base Module
quests.subtitle: Steel circuits for bigger ambitions.
quests.description:
Craft a Tier 2 Base Module (steel nuggets + gold).
Steel circuits for bigger ambitions.
Tier II Base Module — the dockyard grows a second spine.

quests.title: Medium Tithe: Steel
quests.subtitle: 150 Steel for Medium Station.
quests.description:
Stockpile 150 Steel Ingots.
150 Steel for Medium Station.
Medium orbit is not a suggestion — stockpile accordingly.

quests.title: Medium Tithe: Heavy
quests.subtitle: 150 Heavy Metal for Medium Station.
quests.description:
Stockpile 150 Heavy Metal Ingots.
150 Heavy Metal for Medium Station.
Matching mass for a proper orbital dockyard.

quests.title: Commission: Medium Station
quests.subtitle: A proper orbital dockyard.
quests.description:
Commission a Medium Space Station via Antenna. Check when medium orbit is yours.
A proper orbital dockyard.
Commission via Antenna. Check when medium orbit is yours.

quests.title: Gravity Normalizer
quests.subtitle: Walk like Earth, even when you aren't.
quests.description:
Craft a Gravity Normalizer Module and install it via Upgrade Station.
Walk like Earth, even when you aren't.
Install via Upgrade Station — Gravity Normalizer as manners.

quests.title: Jet Module
quests.subtitle: EVA with attitude.
quests.description:
Craft a Jet Module for suit mobility in vacuum.
EVA with attitude.
Jet Module for suit mobility in vacuum — dance carefully.

quests.title: Auto Feeder
quests.subtitle: Hunger is optional in orbit.
quests.description:
Craft an Auto Feeder Module. Professional astronauts snack automatically.
Hunger is optional in orbit.
Professional astronauts snack automatically — Auto Feeder.

quests.title: Big Tithe: Steel
quests.subtitle: 200 Steel for Big Station.
quests.description:
Stockpile 200 Steel Ingots — citadel-class orbital.
200 Steel for Big Station — citadel-class orbital.
The Dockyards do not do half-measures at this tier.

quests.title: Big Tithe: Heavy
quests.subtitle: 200 Heavy Metal for Big Station.
quests.description:
Stockpile 200 Heavy Metal Ingots.
200 Heavy Metal for Big Station.
Citadel bones. Stockpile. Commission. Own the dark.

quests.title: Commission: Big Station
quests.subtitle: The Dockyards are complete.
quests.description:
Commission a Big Space Station. Check when the largest orbital is online.
You are no longer a visitor. You are infrastructure.

quests.title: Vacuumator
quests.subtitle: Clean the air you paid for.
quests.description:
Craft a Vacuumator for station / habitat air handling.
Clean the air you paid for.
Vacuumator for station and habitat air handling — breathe with intent.

quests.title: Admiral of the Void
quests.subtitle: Flags on planets. Beacons in orbit.
quests.description:
Hold Antenna, Upgrade Station, and a planetary Flag together.
Check when the Guide admits you run a space program.

groups.title: Tavern Tales
groups.blurb: The soft chapters: family, pets, music, money, and mischief.

chapters.title: Hearts & Homesteads
chapters.subtitle: MCA — romance, rings, family lore

quests.title: Matchmaker's Hint
quests.subtitle: Chemistry is a craftable rumor.
quests.description:
Obtain a Matchmaker's Ring. Point two villagers at destiny.
Chemistry is a craftable rumor.
Point two villagers at destiny — Matchmaker's Hint accepted.

quests.title: Engagement
quests.subtitle: A promise with a gem budget.
quests.description:
Obtain an Engagement Ring. Propose carefully. Save often.
A promise with a gem budget.
Propose carefully. Save often. Engagement is a soft save point.

quests.title: Wedding Bell
quests.subtitle: The hold gains a subplot.
quests.description:
Obtain a Wedding Ring. Ceremony optional; paperwork eternal.
The hold gains a subplot.
Ceremony optional; paperwork eternal — Wedding Bell rings anyway.

quests.title: Family Book
quests.subtitle: Lore you can shelve.
quests.description:
Obtain a Book of Family. Write the dynasty before it writes you.
Lore you can shelve.
Write the dynasty before it writes you — Family Book open.

quests.title: Rose Gold Gesture
quests.subtitle: Soft metal, hard feelings.
quests.description:
Obtain Rose Gold Ingot. Romance with a metallurgist's flair.
Soft metal, hard feelings.
Romance with a metallurgist's flair — Rose Gold Gesture.

chapters.title: Menagerie
chapters.subtitle: Hamsters — morale as a combat buff

quests.title: Sunflower Diplomacy
quests.subtitle: Bribes that squeak.
quests.description:
Obtain Sunflower Seeds. Friendship begins as a snack.
Bribes that squeak.
Friendship begins as a snack — Sunflower Diplomacy.

quests.title: First Familiar
quests.subtitle: Adopt chaos in pocket size.
quests.description:
Tame or house a hamster companion. Check when the squeaking has a name.
Adopt chaos in pocket size.
Check when the squeaking has a name — First Familiar.

quests.title: Proper Bedding
quests.subtitle: Even legends need soft landings.
quests.description:
Craft Hamster Bedding. Luxury for the smallest party member.
Even legends need soft landings.
Luxury for the smallest party member — Proper Bedding.

quests.title: Oak Nest
quests.subtitle: A bed with architectural opinions.
quests.description:
Craft an Oak Hamster Bed. Interior design for rodents.
A bed with architectural opinions.
Interior design for rodents — Oak Nest approved.

quests.title: Menagerie Complete
quests.subtitle: The tavern acknowledges the fluff.
quests.description:
Show off your hamster setup to a friend. Check when morale is measurably higher.
The tavern acknowledges the fluff.
Show the setup. Check when morale is measurably higher.

chapters.title: Bard's Corner
chapters.subtitle: Exposure & Etched — capture and score the tale

quests.title: Lens of Legend
quests.subtitle: Proof or it did not happen.
quests.description:
Craft a Camera. Adventuring without photos is hearsay.
Proof or it did not happen.
Adventuring without photos is hearsay — Lens of Legend.

quests.title: Film Stock
quests.subtitle: Light needs a medium.
quests.description:
Obtain Color Film. Memory is chemistry.
Light needs a medium.
Memory is chemistry — Film Stock ready.

quests.title: First Photograph
quests.subtitle: Frame a moment worth bragging about.
quests.description:
Develop or obtain a Photograph. Hang the evidence.
Frame a moment worth bragging about.
Hang the evidence. First Photograph earned.

quests.title: Lightroom
quests.subtitle: Edit the myth.
quests.description:
Craft a Lightroom. Post-processing is also storytelling.
Edit the myth.
Post-processing is also storytelling — Lightroom open.

quests.title: Album of Ages
quests.subtitle: Bind the campaign into pages.
quests.description:
Obtain an Album. Chapters deserve covers.
Bind the campaign into pages.
Chapters deserve covers — Album of Ages.

quests.title: Etching Table
quests.subtitle: Scratch music into the world.
quests.description:
Craft an Etching Table. The bard's forge.
Scratch music into the world.
The bard's forge — Etching Table lit.

quests.title: Blank Disc
quests.subtitle: Silence waiting for a song.
quests.description:
Obtain a Blank Music Disc. Potential in polymer form.
Silence waiting for a song.
Potential in polymer form — Blank Disc ready.

quests.title: Boombox Doctrine
quests.subtitle: Portable soundtrack for the road.
quests.description:
Craft a Boombox. Carry the tavern with you.
Portable soundtrack for the road.
Carry the tavern with you — Boombox Doctrine.

chapters.title: Coin & Contract
chapters.subtitle: Numismatics & Bountiful — pay, hire, prosper

quests.title: First Spur
quests.subtitle: Smallest coin. Biggest lesson.
quests.description:
Obtain a Spur. Economies begin as pocket change.
Smallest coin. Biggest lesson.
Economies begin as pocket change — First Spur.

quests.title: Bevel Stack
quests.subtitle: Promotion in metal form.
quests.description:
Obtain Bevels. Climb the denomination ladder.
Promotion in metal form.
Climb the denomination ladder — Bevel Stack.

quests.title: Cog Wealth
quests.subtitle: Serious money makes serious noise.
quests.description:
Obtain Cogs. The Create economy's middle class.
Serious money makes serious noise.
The Create economy's middle class — Cog Wealth.

quests.title: Vendor's Booth
quests.subtitle: Sell without begging.
quests.description:
Craft a Vendor. Automate capitalism with manners.
Sell without begging.
Automate capitalism with manners — Vendor's Booth.

quests.title: Bank Terminal
quests.subtitle: Store the surplus. Trust carefully.
quests.description:
Craft a Bank Terminal. Empires need vaults.
Store the surplus. Trust carefully.
Empires need vaults — Bank Terminal humming.

quests.title: Bounty Board
quests.subtitle: Work for strangers. Get paid in lore.
quests.description:
Place a Bounty Board. Contracts are adventure with invoices.
Work for strangers. Get paid in lore.
Contracts are adventure with invoices — Bounty Board up.

quests.title: First Contract
quests.subtitle: Complete a bounty. Cash the receipt.
quests.description:
Finish any bounty and claim the reward. Check when the board respects you.
Complete a bounty. Cash the receipt.
Check when the board respects you — First Contract sealed.

chapters.title: Chaos Dice
chapters.subtitle: Carry On & lucky nonsense — optional entropy

quests.title: Carry On
quests.subtitle: Inventory is a suggestion.
quests.description:
Pick up a mob or entity with Carry On (or your pack's grab key).
Check when chaos has been portable.

quests.title: Lucky Fool
quests.subtitle: Roll with it.
quests.description:
Do something stupid that works. Survive. Check when the table laughs.
Roll with it.
Do something stupid that works. Survive. Let the table laugh.

quests.title: Slime Diplomacy
quests.subtitle: Bounce is a negotiation tactic.
quests.description:
Obtain 16 Slimeballs. Soft power. Sticky morals.
Bounce is a negotiation tactic.
Soft power. Sticky morals — sixteen Slimeballs as tribute.

quests.title: Dice Closed
quests.subtitle: Entropy acknowledged.
quests.description:
Tell the party your funniest failure this session. Check to seal the tale.
Entropy acknowledged.
Tell the party your funniest failure this session — seal the tale.

groups.blurb: Deep dives into the Create addons that round out the workshop.

quests.subtitle: This machine simplifies channeling setups.

quests.title: Obtain Nautilus Shell
quests.subtitle: Nautilus shells can be obtained from the ocean or by bulk washing or channeling suspicious rocks.

quests.title: Throw a Nautilus Shell into the Crushing Wheel
quests.subtitle: This produces Spiky Shells.

quests.title: Obtain Awkward potion
quests.subtitle: Use for Creating Different Potions

quests.title: Set up Mechanical Mixer With blaze burner
quests.subtitle: Set up a Blaze Burner, Mechanical Mixer, and Basin to create potions. Place a Mechanical Pipe near the Basin to drain the potions into a Fluid Tank.

quests.title: Obtain Any Potions on Mechanical Mixer
quests.subtitle: Conduit Cage: a machine used for granting/removing effects

quests.title: Craft Trident
quests.subtitle: Finally you can Craft it.

quests.title: Obtain flint
quests.subtitle: Place it into a depot and wait for the Conduit Cage to convert it into Prismarine Shards.

quests.title: Obtain Prismarine Shards
quests.subtitle: They can be used for crafting.

quests.title: Obtain Glow Dust
quests.subtitle: The Conduit Cage will gradually turn it into Prismarine Crystals

quests.title: Obtain Prismarine Crystals
quests.subtitle: They can be used as a light source or for crafting.

quests.subtitle: This Mod Based on Transferring Rotational Force by Light

quests.subtitle: Optical Source: emit different types of beams based on the rotational force applied

quests.subtitle: Optical Receptor: transform the received beam into rotational force based on its properties

quests.subtitle: Same As Optical Receptor but does more to it

quests.title: Obtain Hologram Source.

quests.subtitle: Beam Reader: display the properties of the incident beam

quests.subtitle: Uses for Display and Beam Reader

quests.title: Obtain Optical Device
quests.subtitle: Use for the Beam and Optical Devices.

quests.title: Obtain Mirrors
quests.subtitle: Mirror: reflect the beam perpendicularly

quests.title: Obtain Polarizing Filter
quests.subtitle: Polarizing Filter: polarize the beam

quests.subtitle: Same As a Normal Optical Source

quests.title: Obtain Andesite Alloy
quests.subtitle: 90% Create mods uses Andesite Alloy.

quests.title: Gather Supplies
quests.subtitle: And Use the spout to Create Optical Device.

quests.title: Obtain Nuggets of Experience.
quests.subtitle: There are 3 ways to get Nuggets of Experience: Crushing Wheels, mob farms, and Bottles of Experience.

quests.title: Craft Grindstone and Item Drain.
quests.subtitle: Fully automated Grindstone That can be used on removing enchantment on your tools or weapons and polishing quartz.

quests.title: Craft Block of Experice.
quests.subtitle: Can be used for feeding the Blaze Forger and Blaze Enchanter or for crafting other items.

quests.title: Craft Expericence Hatch.
quests.subtitle: Experience Hatch: Interact with fluid tank directly, with your own experience.

quests.title: Craft Experience Lantern.
quests.subtitle: Experience Lantern: Absorb experience, and also work on contraption.

quests.title: Craft Lighting rod.
quests.subtitle: Place near the Block of Experience during a thunderstorm.

quests.title: Obtain Super Experience Block.
quests.subtitle: Congratulations! You have obtained Super Experience, which can be used on the Blaze Forger or Enchanter to create more powerful enchants.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: First step is to saw and press a tumbaga sheet to create the head casing, then you will then need to imbue the head with the effects of fire resistance and regeneration. When that is done, a tumbaga alloy is used to seal the potions and add the iconic nose, finishing the totem head.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: A similar process follows the creation of the totem's body. You simply saw and press a tumbaga alloy, and instead of potions, you deploy a ghast tear to give the totem regenerative powers and then deploy a tumbaga alloy to seal it up.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: With both of the totem parts you can now start the assembling procedure. Along with the totem parts you will also need to add the emerald eyes of the totem. This is done by placing all the needed parts into four mechanical crafters.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: The final part of the process, is to deploy 5 experience blocks or spout 135mB of liquid experience to activate the assembled totem.

quests.title: Untitled Quest
quests.subtitle: An encased chain drive with an additional cogwheel for connectivity

quests.title: Obtain Crank wheel
quests.subtitle: Hand cranks with a cogwheel installed. Handy for gear ratios and tight spaces

quests.title: Obtain Clutch
quests.subtitle: A clutch that is uncoupled unless powered

quests.title: Obtain Gearshift
quests.subtitle: A gearshift that changes rotation direction unless powered

quests.title: Obtain Parallel Gearbox
quests.subtitle: A gearbox with all 4 sides spinning in the same direction

quests.title: Obtain 6-way Gearbox.
quests.subtitle: A gearbox with shafts on all 6 sides. Conceptually uses the same internal mechanism as Parallel Gearbox, so top and bottom spins at half speed

quests.title: Obtain Cross Connector
quests.subtitle: Relays rotation in two directions independently.

quests.title: Obtain Kinetic bridge
quests.subtitle: Transfer stress capacity from one network to another while keeping the networks separate. Guarantees that the source network will not be affected when the destination network is overstressed

quests.title: Obtain Brake
quests.subtitle: A device that produces immense stress when powered, halting the network by overstressing it

quests.title: Obtain Overstress clutch
quests.subtitle: A clutch that uncouples after a set delay when the network is overstressed. Can be reset with a wrench

quests.title: Obtain Centrifugal Clutch
quests.subtitle: A clutch that is only coupled if the input RPM is faster than a configurable threshold

quests.title: Obtain Freewheel clutch
quests.subtitle: A clutch that is only coupled if the input spins in the correct direction as configured

quests.title: Obtain Linked Transmitter
quests.subtitle: A compact Redstone Link that adds wireless redstone to buttons, levers, and linked levers without using extra block space
